		while(n{int} {n}  <= 8) 
			set_control_par_str(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + n{int} {n} ]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE} , lib_prefix{string} {lib_prefix}  & "btn_seq"){Builtin, None}
			inc(n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(lbl_env_rhythm{int[]} {lbl_env_rhythm} ){Builtin, None} - 1))

on persistence_changed{thread-unsafe}
	call update_assigned_instruments{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_engine_active_states{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_octave_shifts{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_instr_labels{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_engine_visibility{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_ir{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_nks_labels{UserDefined, Call}
	call note_selection_backward_check{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_note_selection{UserDefined, Call}
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  := max_eight_notes_list[s{int} {s} ]{int} {max_eight_notes_list} 
	select(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} )
	case 0
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 8
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 60
	case 1
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 4
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 120
	case 2
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 240
	case 3
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 480
	case 4
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 960
	case 5
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := ((arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} ) * 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 160
	case 6
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := (arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 320
	case 7
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := ((arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} ) / 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 640
	end select
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 2)
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  * 2
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while

		message("First Group for slot " & hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  & ": " & first_groupID[loaded_instruments_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments_buffer} ]{int} {first_groupID} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	call update_key_colors{UserDefined, Call}
	set_controller(1, 100){Builtin, None}
end on

on note
	ignore_event(EVENT_ID{int} {EVENT_ID} ){Builtin, None}
	if((NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} {NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING}  = 1) and (transport_stamp{int} {transport_stamp}  = -1))

		end if
		exit{Builtin, None}
	else

	end if
	event_velo{int} {event_velo}  := EVENT_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_VELOCITY} 
	event_note{int} {event_note}  := EVENT_NOTE{int} {EVENT_NOTE}

		end if
	end select
	select(arp2.latch_mode{int} {arp2.latch_mode} )

		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0

	if(((((arp1.latch_mode{int} {arp1.latch_mode}  # 0) or (arp2.latch_mode{int} {arp2.latch_mode}  # 0)) or (arp3.latch_mode{int} {arp3.latch_mode}  # 0)) or (env1.latch_mode{int} {env1.latch_mode}  # 0)) or (env2.latch_mode{int} {env2.latch_mode}  # 0))

end on

on ui_control(arp1.active{int} {arp1.active} ){thread-unsafe}
	arp1.latch_mode{int} {arp1.latch_mode}  := arp1.active{int} {arp1.active} 
	select(arp1.latch_mode{int} {arp1.latch_mode} )
	case 0
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  <= (arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  - 1)) 
			arp1.note_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.note_buffer}  := 0
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  := 0
	case 1
		arp1.b{int} {arp1.b}  := arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor} 
		arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  := 0
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.b{int} {arp1.b} ) 
			if(arp1.pressed_id[arp1.note_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.note_buffer} ]{int} {arp1.pressed_id}  > 0)
				arp1.note_buffer[arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor} ]{int} {arp1.note_buffer}  := arp1.note_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.note_buffer} 
				inc(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor} ){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end select
	arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  := 0
	arp1.bar_count{int} {arp1.bar_count}  := 0
	call update_assigned_instruments{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_engine_active_states{UserDefined, Call}
	call show_hide_active_labels{UserDefined, Call}
end on

			message(base_path{string} {base_path}  & file_name_array[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{string} {file_name_array}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None}

				load_new{int} {load_new}  := 0
				preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}  := preset.array[4]{int} {preset.array} 
			else

			end if
			preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}  := preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}

		call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, Call}
		i{int} {i}  := NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} {NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS} 
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (NUM_PRESETS{int} {NUM_PRESETS}  - 1)) 
			favorite_presets_array[i{int} {i} ]{int} {favorite_presets_array}  := 0

		end while

		call on_button_tag{UserDefined, Call}

			load_new{int} {load_new}  := 0
		end if

		btn_scan_presets{int} {btn_scan_presets}  := 0

on ui_control(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order} )
	if(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  # 99)
		arp1.last_note_order{int} {arp1.last_note_order}  := arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order} 
		_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + (arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}

			arp1.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp1.btn_seq_mode}  := 1
			arp1.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp1.btn_arp_mode}  := 0
		else

		end if
		call visibility.arp_seq_mode{UserDefined, Call}
		call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}
	else
		arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  := arp1.last_note_order{int} {arp1.last_note_order} 
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp1.lbl_note_order{int} {arp1.lbl_note_order} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  - 2){Builtin, None}
end on

on ui_control(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} )
	_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 3)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} 
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	if((s{int} {s}  > 2) and (arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  > 4))
		arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  := arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  - 3
		i{int} {i}  := 5
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	else
		if(s{int} {s}  < 3)
			i{int} {i}  := 5
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  > 4)
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list_triplets[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list_triplets} 
		else
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list} 
		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 7)
		arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps}  := arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  := max_eight_notes_list[s{int} {s} ]{int} {max_eight_notes_list} 
	select(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} )
	case 0
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 8
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 60
	case 1
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 4
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 120
	case 2
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 240
	case 3
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 480
	case 4
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 960
	case 5
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := ((arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} ) * 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 160
	case 6
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := (arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 320
	case 7
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := ((arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} ) / 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 640
	end select
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 2)
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  * 2
	end if
end on

	arp2.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp2.btn_arp_mode}  := 0
	arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  := 15

on ui_control(arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order} )
	if(arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  # 99)
		arp2.last_note_order{int} {arp2.last_note_order}  := arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order} 
		_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + (arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  * 9)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order} 
		if(arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  = 15)
			arp2.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp2.btn_seq_mode}  := 1
			arp2.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp2.btn_arp_mode}  := 0
		else
			arp2.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp2.btn_seq_mode}  := 0
			arp2.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp2.btn_arp_mode}  := 1
			arp2.last_non_custom_order{int} {arp2.last_non_custom_order}  := arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order} 
		end if
		call visibility.arp_seq_mode{UserDefined, Call}
		call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}
	else
		arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  := arp2.last_note_order{int} {arp2.last_note_order} 
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp2.lbl_note_order{int} {arp2.lbl_note_order} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  - 2){Builtin, None}
end on

on ui_control(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} )
	_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  * 9) + 1)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} 
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 8)
		arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps}  := arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	call update_rhythm_values{UserDefined, Call}
	call visibility.show_custom_seq{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_seq_pitches{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(arp2.skip{int} {arp2.skip} )
	_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  * 9) + 2)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp2.skip{int} {arp2.skip}

on ui_control(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} )
	_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  * 9) + 3)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} 
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	if((s{int} {s}  > 2) and (arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  > 4))
		arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  := arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  - 3
		i{int} {i}  := 5
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	else
		if(s{int} {s}  < 3)
			i{int} {i}  := 5
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  > 4)
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list_triplets[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list_triplets} 
		else
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list} 
		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 8)
		arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps}  := arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  := max_eight_notes_list[s{int} {s} ]{int} {max_eight_notes_list} 
	select(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} )
	case 0
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  * 8
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 60
	case 1
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  * 4
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 120
	case 2
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  * 2
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 240
	case 3
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 480
	case 4
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  / 2
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 960
	case 5
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := ((arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes} ) * 2
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 160
	case 6
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := (arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 320
	case 7
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := ((arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp2.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp2.max_eighth_notes} ) / 2
		arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length}  := 640
	end select
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(arp2.mnu_reset{int} {arp2.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 2)
		arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  := arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit}  * 2
	end if
end on

	if(arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  # 99)
		arp3.last_note_order{int} {arp3.last_note_order}  := arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order} 
		_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + (arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  * 9)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order} 
		if(arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  = 15)
			arp3.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp3.btn_seq_mode}  := 1
			arp3.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp3.btn_arp_mode}  := 0
		else
			arp3.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp3.btn_seq_mode}  := 0
			arp3.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp3.btn_arp_mode}  := 1
			arp3.last_non_custom_order{int} {arp3.last_non_custom_order}  := arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order} 
		end if
		call visibility.arp_seq_mode{UserDefined, Call}
		call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}
	else
		arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  := arp3.last_note_order{int} {arp3.last_note_order} 
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp3.lbl_note_order{int} {arp3.lbl_note_order} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  - 2){Builtin, None}
end on

on ui_control(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} )
	_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  * 9) + 1)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} 
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 9)
		arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  := arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else

			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	call update_rhythm_values{UserDefined, Call}
	call visibility.show_custom_seq{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_seq_pitches{UserDefined, Call}

on ui_control(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} )
	_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  * 9) + 3)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} 
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	if((s{int} {s}  > 2) and (arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate}  > 4))
		arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate}  := arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate}  - 3
		i{int} {i}  := 5
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	else
		if(s{int} {s}  < 3)
			i{int} {i}  := 5
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate}  > 4)
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list_triplets[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list_triplets} 
		else
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list} 
		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 9)
		arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  := arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  := max_eight_notes_list[s{int} {s} ]{int} {max_eight_notes_list} 
	select(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} )
	case 0
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  * 8
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 60
	case 1
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  * 4
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 120
	case 2
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  * 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 240
	case 3
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 480
	case 4
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 960
	case 5
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := ((arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} ) * 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 160
	case 6
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := (arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 320
	case 7
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := ((arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} ) / 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 640
	end select
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(arp3.mnu_reset{int} {arp3.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 2)
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  * 2
	end if
end on

on ui_control(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} )
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	if((s{int} {s}  > 2) and (arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  > 4))
		arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  := arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  - 3
		i{int} {i}  := 5
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	else
		if(s{int} {s}  < 3)
			i{int} {i}  := 5
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  > 4)
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list_triplets[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list_triplets} 
		else
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list} 
		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rhythm_steps{int} {arp2.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	if((s{int} {s}  > 2) and (arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  > 4))
		arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  := arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  - 3
		i{int} {i}  := 5
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	else
		if(s{int} {s}  < 3)
			i{int} {i}  := 5
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate}  > 4)
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list_triplets[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list_triplets} 
		else
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list} 
		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)

on ui_control(xy_seq{real[]} {xy_seq} ){thread-unsafe}
	xy_seq.x{int} {xy_seq.x}  := (real_to_int(round(xy_seq[0]{real} {xy_seq}  * 665){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_seq{real[]} {xy_seq} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None}) + 5
	xy_seq.y{int} {xy_seq.y}  := (real_to_int(round(abs(1 - xy_seq[1]{real} {xy_seq} ){Builtin, None} * 158){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_seq{real[]} {xy_seq} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None}) + 5
	xy_active_column{int} {xy_active_column}  := -1
	xy_active_row{int} {xy_active_row}  := -1
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps}  - 1))

					set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[tb_idx{int} {tb_idx} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , 0){Builtin, None}

				end if
			end select
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := 0
	while(s{int} {s}  <= 31) 
		tbl_arp_dummy[s{int} {s} ]{int} {tbl_arp_dummy}  := 0
		inc(s{int} {s} ){Builtin, None}

			while(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  <= (rr_nums[loaded_instruments[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums}  - 1)) 
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL{int} {ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + allowed00{int} {allowed00} , -1, -1){Builtin, None}
				if(art_length[loaded_instruments[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  # 0)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL{int} {ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} , (first_groupID[loaded_instruments[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + allowed00{int} {allowed00} ) + rr_nums[loaded_instruments[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} , -1, -1){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			loaded_instruments_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments_buffer}  := loaded_instruments[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} 
			message("First Group for slot " & hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  & ": " & first_groupID[loaded_instruments_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments_buffer} ]{int} {first_groupID} ){Builtin, None}
			inc(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		call update_key_colors{UserDefined, Call}
		call remote_art_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
		browser.art_buttons6{int} {browser.art_buttons6}  := 1
		call update_instr_labels{UserDefined, Call}
		call update_engine_visibility{UserDefined, Call}
		call update_assigned_instruments{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
	call check_loaded_art{UserDefined, Call}
	call double_click{UserDefined, Call}
end on

on ui_control(browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar} )
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None} + ((browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} {browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height}  - browser.handle_size_art{int} {browser.handle_size_art} ) - ((browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar}  * (browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} {browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height}  - browser.handle_size_art{int} {browser.handle_size_art} )) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
	call check_loaded_art{UserDefined, Call}
end on

		call show_hide_active_labels{UserDefined, Call}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1 - mixer.rev_bypass{int} {mixer.rev_bypass} , -1, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
		mixer.rev_bypass_last_value{int} {mixer.rev_bypass_last_value}  := mixer.rev_bypass{int} {mixer.rev_bypass} 
	else
		mixer.rev_bypass{int} {mixer.rev_bypass}  := mixer.rev_bypass_last_value{int} {mixer.rev_bypass_last_value} 
	end if
end on

	if(mixer.rev_lock{int} {mixer.rev_lock}  = 0)

		mixer.return{int} {mixer.return}  := mixer.return_last_value{int} {mixer.return_last_value} 
	end if

end on

function update_key_colors
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 127) 
		set_key_color(i{int} {i} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int} {KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE} ){Builtin, None}
		set_key_type(i{int} {i} , NI_KEY_TYPE_NONE{int} {NI_KEY_TYPE_NONE} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		set_key_color(keyswitches[i{int} {i} ]{int} {keyswitches} , KEY_COLOR_RED{int} {KEY_COLOR_RED} ){Builtin, None}
		set_key_type(keyswitches[i{int} {i} ]{int} {keyswitches} , NI_KEY_TYPE_CONTROL{int} {NI_KEY_TYPE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_key_pressed(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch} ]{int} {keyswitches} , 1){Builtin, None}
	set_key_color(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch} ]{int} {keyswitches} , KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{int} {KEY_COLOR_ORANGE} ){Builtin, None}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		n{int} {n}  := loaded_instruments[i{int} {i} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  - 1
		if(n{int} {n}  >= 0)
			s{int} {s}  := art_note_ranges[n{int} {n} ]{int} {art_note_ranges} 
			while(s{int} {s}  <= art_note_ranges[n{int} {n}  + (num_elements(art_note_ranges{int[]} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None} / 2)]{int} {art_note_ranges} ) 
				if(s{int} {s}  > keyswitches[4]{int} {keyswitches} )
					set_key_color(s{int} {s} , KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int} {KEY_COLOR_BLUE} ){Builtin, None}
					set_key_type(s{int} {s} , NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT{int} {NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT} ){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(s{int} {s} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(get_control_par(assign_slot_menus[i{int} {i} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} > 0)
			i{int} {i}  := 48
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 72) 
				set_key_color(i{int} {i} , KEY_COLOR_GREEN{int} {KEY_COLOR_GREEN} ){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function update_assigned_instruments{thread-unsafe}

			end if
			wait(1){Builtin, None}

		end while
		select(i1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {i1} )
		case 1
			arp1.latch_mode{int} {arp1.latch_mode}  := mode0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {mode0} 
		case 2

		case 3

function update_engine_active_states

end function

	end while
end function

function update_engine_visibility
	v00{int} {v00}  := 0
	i5{int} {i5}  := 0
	while(i5{int} {i5}  <= 5) 
		v00{int} {v00}  := 0
		while(v00{int} {v00}  <= 4) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menus[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , i5{int} {i5} , 1){Builtin, None}
			inc(v00{int} {v00} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i5{int} {i5} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i5{int} {i5}  := 0
	while(i5{int} {i5}  <= (num_elements(loaded_instruments{int[]} {loaded_instruments} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		if((loaded_instruments[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  # 0) and (art_length[loaded_instruments[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 1))
			if(get_control_par(assign_slot_menus[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} < 4)
				set_control_par(assign_slot_menus[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None}
			end if
			v00{int} {v00}  := 1
			while(v00{int} {v00}  <= 3) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menus[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , v00{int} {v00} , 0){Builtin, None}
				inc(v00{int} {v00} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		else
			if((loaded_instruments[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  # 0) and (art_length[loaded_instruments[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 0))
				if(get_control_par(assign_slot_menus[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} >= 4)
					set_control_par(assign_slot_menus[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None}
				end if
				v00{int} {v00}  := 4
				while(v00{int} {v00}  <= 5) 
					set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menus[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , v00{int} {v00} , 0){Builtin, None}
					inc(v00{int} {v00} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end if
		end if
		inc(i5{int} {i5} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

	load_id{int} {load_id}  := load_ir_sample(mixer.ir_names[mixer.ir_menu{int} {mixer.ir_menu} ]{string} {mixer.ir_names} , 0, 0){Builtin, None}

	end while
end function

function bitlist.set_range

function update.preset_button_focus

			end if

			end if
		end if
		if((search(final_preset_numbers_array{int[]} {final_preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13)) and (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  > 13))
			scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13
		end if
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := (sh_right(scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} , 31){Builtin, None} + 1) * scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} 
	else
		if(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}  = -1)
			scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := 0
		end if
	end if
	if(scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13))
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13
	end if
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  < 13)
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := 0
	end if
end function

function repaint.scrollarea
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 12) 
		set_control_par_str(btn_preset_button[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_preset_button} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "      " & final_preset_title_array[i{int} {i}  + scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ]{string} {final_preset_title_array} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_preset_button} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , btn_preset_onoff[i{int} {i}  + scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ]{int} {btn_preset_onoff} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_favorite[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_preset_favorite} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , final_favorite_presets_array[i{int} {i}  + scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ]{int} {final_favorite_presets_array} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_preset_button} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} {i}  + scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ]{int} {end_of_presets_array} ]{int} {hide_state} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(btn_preset_favorite[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_preset_favorite} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} {i}  + scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ]{int} {end_of_presets_array} ]{int} {hide_state} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(abs(sh_right(abs(1 + sh_right(abs(bit_list[0]{int} {bit_list}  + bit_list[1]{int} {bit_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} = 1)
		scroll.up_origin{int} {scroll.up_origin}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} 
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scrollhandle{int} {lbl_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None} + ((268 - handle_size{int} {handle_size} ) - ((sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar}  * (268 - handle_size{int} {handle_size} )) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
end function

function on_button_tag override
{thread-unsafe}
	bit_list2[0]{int} {bit_list2}  := bit_list[0]{int} {bit_list} 
	bit_list2[1]{int} {bit_list2}  := bit_list[1]{int} {bit_list} 
	if((saving_preset{int} {saving_preset}  = 0) and (tag_button_pressed{int} {tag_button_pressed}  = 0))
		tag_button_pressed{int} {tag_button_pressed}  := 1
		v00{int} {v00}  := escape00{int} {escape00} 
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := allowed00{int} {allowed00} 
		hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} 
		call filter_presets{UserDefined, Call}
		if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  = 0)
			p{int} {p}  := 32
			while((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  = 0) and (p{int} {p}  >= 0)) 
				if((sh_right(bit_list[p{int} {p}  / 32]{int} {bit_list} , (31 - p{int} {p} ) mod 32){Builtin, None} .and. 1) = 1)
					set_control_par(tag_button_array[p{int} {p} ]{int} {tag_button_array} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None}
					hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := p{int} {p} 
					hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
					bit_list[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 32]{int} {bit_list}  := (bit_list[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 32]{int} {bit_list}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ) mod 32){Builtin, None}) .or. sh_left(0, (31 - hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ) mod 32){Builtin, None}
					v00{int} {v00}  := allowed00{int} {allowed00} 
					hold00{int} {hold00}  := v00{int} {v00} 
					hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} 
					call filter_presets{UserDefined, Call}
					wait(5){Builtin, None}
				end if
				dec(p{int} {p} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		idx18{int} {idx18}  := bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} 
		call tag_state_handling{UserDefined, Call}
		if(preset_scan{int} {preset_scan}  = 0)
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_presetcount{int} {lbl_presetcount} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{int} {NUM_PRESETS} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(end_of_presets_array{int[]} {end_of_presets_array} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			end_of_presets_array[i{int} {i} ]{int} {end_of_presets_array}  := 1 + (sh_right((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 1) - i{int} {i} , 31){Builtin, None} .or. sh_right(i{int} {i} , 31){Builtin, None})
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := real_to_int(round((((int_to_real(scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} ){Builtin, None} - 0) * (int_to_real(1 - ((1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13)) .and. sh_right(1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13), 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None} - 0)) / (int_to_real(1 - ((1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD}  - 13)) .and. sh_right(1 - (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD}  - 13), 31){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None} - 0)) + 0){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		call update.preset_button_focus{UserDefined, Call}
		if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_clear_tags{int} {btn_clear_tags} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)
			if(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}  # -1)
				if(abs(sh_right(abs(1 + sh_right(abs(bit_list[0]{int} {bit_list}  + bit_list[1]{int} {bit_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} = 1)
					scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} 
				else
					scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := search(final_preset_numbers_array{int[]} {final_preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}
				end if
			else
				scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  := scroll.up_origin{int} {scroll.up_origin} 
			end if
			btn_clear_tags{int} {btn_clear_tags}  := 0
		end if
		if(btn_presetBrowser{int} {btn_presetBrowser}  = 1)
			call repaint.scrollarea{UserDefined, Call}
			if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  > 13)
				sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar}  := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  - 13)) * scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} )
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR{int} {CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR} , - (3536 + (2 * (NUM_PRESETS{int} {NUM_PRESETS}  - NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS} )))){Builtin, None}
				handle_size{int} {handle_size}  := real_to_int(round(268 / (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS} ){Builtin, None} / 13)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				if(handle_size{int} {handle_size}  < 30)
					handle_size{int} {handle_size}  := 30
				end if
			else
				sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar}  := 1000000
				handle_size{int} {handle_size}  := 268
			end if
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scrollhandle{int} {lbl_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , handle_size{int} {handle_size} ){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scrollhandle{int} {lbl_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None} + ((268 - handle_size{int} {handle_size} ) - ((sli_scrollbar{int} {sli_scrollbar}  * (268 - handle_size{int} {handle_size} )) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
		end if
		tag_button_pressed{int} {tag_button_pressed}  := 0
	end if
end function

function update.preset_browser{thread-unsafe}
	if(search(final_preset_numbers_array{int[]} {final_preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None} = -1)
		preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}  := 0
	end if
	btn_scan_presets{int} {btn_scan_presets}  := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, Call}
	lib.i{int} {lib.i}  := 0
	while(lib.i{int} {lib.i}  <= ((64 - ((64 - num_elements(tag_button_array{int[]} {tag_button_array} ){Builtin, None}) .and. sh_right(num_elements(tag_button_array{int[]} {tag_button_array} ){Builtin, None} - 64, 31){Builtin, None})) - 1)) 
		hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := lib.i{int} {lib.i} 
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := get_control_par(tag_button_array[lib.i{int} {lib.i} ]{int} {tag_button_array} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}
		bit_list[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 32]{int} {bit_list}  := (bit_list[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 32]{int} {bit_list}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ) mod 32){Builtin, None}) .or. sh_left(hold00{int} {hold00} , (31 - hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ) mod 32){Builtin, None}
		inc(lib.i{int} {lib.i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, Call}
	escape00{int} {escape00}  := hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} 
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := i5{int} {i5} 
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := i500{int} {i500} 
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function visibility.show_custom_seq
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
	select(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage} )
	case 7
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps}  - 1
		cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps}  := hold00{int} {hold00}  + 1
	case 8
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps}  - 1
		cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps}  := hold00{int} {hold00}  + 1
	case 9
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  - 1
		cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps}  := hold00{int} {hold00}  + 1
	end select
	cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps}  := cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps} 
	if(cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
		cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps}  := signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} 
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 31) 
		bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
		while(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  <= 8) 
			set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
			inc(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(i{int} {i}  > (cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps}  - 1))
			bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
			while(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  <= 8) 
				set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
				inc(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

					set_control_par(get_ui_id(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , 80){Builtin, None}
					cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height}  := 74
					cur_rhythm_y_offset{int} {cur_rhythm_y_offset}  := 265
				end if
			end if
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_rhythm{real[]} {xy_rhythm} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} ){Builtin, None} - -3){Builtin, None}
		case 9
			if(arp3.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp3.btn_arp_mode}  = 1)
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(panel.arp3.arp_mode_exclusive{int} {panel.arp3.arp_mode_exclusive} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}

				set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp3.mnu_reset{int} {arp3.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp3.skip{int} {arp3.skip} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , 190){Builtin, None}
				cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height}  := 184
				cur_rhythm_y_offset{int} {cur_rhythm_y_offset}  := 375
			else
				if(arp3.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp3.btn_seq_mode}  = 1)
					set_control_par(get_ui_id(panel.arp3.arp_mode_exclusive{int} {panel.arp3.arp_mode_exclusive} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}

		end select
	end if

function ui.update_rhythm
	cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width}  := real_to_int(20 * (32 / int_to_real(cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps} ){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None} + table_spacer_widths[cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps} ]{int} {table_spacer_widths} 
	real_tbl_bar_width{real} {real_tbl_bar_width}  := (672 - int_to_real(cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps} ){Builtin, None}) / int_to_real(cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps} ){Builtin, None}
	n{int} {n}  := 0
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 31) 
		s{int} {s}  := real_to_int((real_tbl_bar_width{real} {real_tbl_bar_width}  * int_to_real(i{int} {i}  + 1){Builtin, None}) - (floor(real_tbl_bar_width{real} {real_tbl_bar_width} ){Builtin, None} * int_to_real(i{int} {i}  + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
		if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 3) and (i{int} {i}  = 14))
			dec(s{int} {s} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if(i{int} {i}  < cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps} )
			set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
			if(s{int} {s}  > n{int} {n} )
				n{int} {n}  := s{int} {s} 
				set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} , cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width}  + 1){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} , cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width} ){Builtin, None}
			end if
			select(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage} )
			case 7
				set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , real_to_int(int_to_real(cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height} ){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm} ){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			case 8
				set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , real_to_int(int_to_real(cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height} ){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm} ){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			case 9
				set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , real_to_int(int_to_real(cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height} ){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(_arp3.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm} ){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			end select
			set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , cur_rhythm_y_offset{int} {cur_rhythm_y_offset}  - get_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} ){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
			if(i{int} {i}  = 0)
				set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , 89){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(get_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None} > cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width} )
					set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , (get_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i}  - 1]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i}  - 1]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None}) + 1){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , (get_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i}  - 1]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} ){Builtin, None} + get_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i}  - 1]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None}) + 1){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		else
			set_control_par(lbl_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	if(cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps}  # cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps} )
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height} ){Builtin, None}
		if(cur_rhythm_height{int} {cur_rhythm_height}  < 80)
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} ){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		end if
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} , ((cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width}  * (cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps}  - cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps} )) + (cur_visible_steps{int} {cur_visible_steps}  - cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps} )) - 1){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , ((86 + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(xy_rhythm{real[]} {xy_rhythm} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None} - get_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_dark_overlay{int} {lbl_dark_overlay} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH{int} {CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH} ){Builtin, None})) + 3) - 10){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function ui.update_seq_pitches
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 31) 
		n{int} {n}  := 0
		while(n{int} {n}  <= 8) 
			set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + n{int} {n} ]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 31) 
		select(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage} )
		case 7
			set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + search(seq_pitch_values{int[]} {seq_pitch_values} , _arp1.custom_pitches[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_arp1.custom_pitches} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , 1){Builtin, None}
		case 8
			set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + search(seq_pitch_values{int[]} {seq_pitch_values} , _arp2.custom_pitches[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_arp2.custom_pitches} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , 1){Builtin, None}
		case 9
			set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + search(seq_pitch_values{int[]} {seq_pitch_values} , _arp3.custom_pitches[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_arp3.custom_pitches} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , 1){Builtin, None}
		end select
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := 0
	while(s{int} {s}  <= 8) 
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 31) 
			set_control_par(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_X{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_X} , ((86 + (cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width}  / 2)) - 1) + ((cur_tbl_bar_width{int} {cur_tbl_bar_width}  + 1) * i{int} {i} )){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(s{int} {s} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function ui.update_env
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 99) 
		select(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage} )
		case 10
			set_control_par(lbl_env_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_env_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , real_to_int(184 * (int_to_real(_env1.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env1.table} ){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		case 11
			set_control_par(lbl_env_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_env_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} , real_to_int(184 * (int_to_real(_env2.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env2.table} ){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		end select
		set_control_par(lbl_env_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_env_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , ((188 - get_control_par(lbl_env_rhythm[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_env_rhythm} , CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT} ){Builtin, None}) + 190) + -3){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function ks.update_button_texts
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(ks.btn_dev_copy_all{int} {ks.btn_dev_copy_all} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "Copy KS " & (current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  + 1)){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(ks.btn_dev_paste_all{int} {ks.btn_dev_paste_all} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "Paste KS " & (ks.copied_ks_idx{int} {ks.copied_ks_idx}  + 1)){Builtin, None}
	if(ks.copied_ks_idx{int} {ks.copied_ks_idx}  = -1)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(ks.btn_dev_paste_all{int} {ks.btn_dev_paste_all} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "Nothing Copied!"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(ks.lbl_paste_info{int} {ks.lbl_paste_info} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "Paste KS " & (ks.copied_ks_idx{int} {ks.copied_ks_idx}  + 1) & " into KS " & (current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  + 1) & "?"){Builtin, None}
end function

function load_keyswitch
	current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  := escape00{int} {escape00} 
	call reset_oct_repeat_cursor{UserDefined, Call}
	message("LOAD THIS KEYSWITCH: " & escape00{int} {escape00} ){Builtin, None}
	arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + (arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 1)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.skip{int} {arp1.skip}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 2)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 3)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.note_selection{int} {arp1.note_selection}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 4)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 5)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.note_repeat{int} {arp1.note_repeat}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 6)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 7)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.transpose{int} {arp1.transpose}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 8)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	if(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 15)
		arp1.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp1.btn_seq_mode}  := 1
		arp1.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp1.btn_arp_mode}  := 0
	else
		arp1.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp1.btn_seq_mode}  := 0
		arp1.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp1.btn_arp_mode}  := 1
		arp1.last_non_custom_order{int} {arp1.last_non_custom_order}  := arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order} 
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp1.lbl_note_order{int} {arp1.lbl_note_order} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  - 2){Builtin, None}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature}
