		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  := max_eight_notes_list[s{int} {s} ]{int} {max_eight_notes_list} 
	select(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} )
	case 0
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  * 8
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 60
	case 1
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  * 4
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 120
	case 2
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  * 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 240
	case 3
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 480
	case 4
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 960
	case 5
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := ((arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} ) * 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 160
	case 6
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := (arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 320
	case 7
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := ((arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp3.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp3.max_eighth_notes} ) / 2
		arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length}  := 640
	end select
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(arp3.mnu_reset{int} {arp3.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 2)
		arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  := arp3.bar_limit{int} {arp3.bar_limit}  * 2
	end if
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 9)
		arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  := arp3.rhythm_steps{int} {arp3.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := idx18{int} {idx18} 
	call visibility.show_custom_seq{UserDefined, Call}
	call visibility.arp_seq_mode{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_seq_pitches{UserDefined, Call}
	call update_note_selection{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(arp3.lbl_repeat{int} {arp3.lbl_repeat} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , arp3.note_repeat{int} {arp3.note_repeat} ){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(arp3.lbl_octave{int} {arp3.lbl_octave} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave} ){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(arp3.lbl_transpose{int} {arp3.lbl_transpose} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , arp3.transpose{int} {arp3.transpose} ){Builtin, None}
	env1.duration_menu{int} {env1.duration_menu}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 6) + ((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  - 3) * 3)]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
	env1.retrigger{int} {env1.retrigger}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 6) + (((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  - 3) * 3) + 1)]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
	env1.note_selection{int} {env1.note_selection}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 6) + (((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  - 3) * 3) + 2)]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
	env1.note_selection_hold{int} {env1.note_selection_hold}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(env1.note_selection{int} {env1.note_selection} ){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(env1.note_selection{int} {env1.note_selection} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	env2.duration_menu{int} {env2.duration_menu}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 6) + ((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  - 3) * 3)]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
	env2.retrigger{int} {env2.retrigger}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 6) + (((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  - 3) * 3) + 1)]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
	env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 6) + (((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  - 3) * 3) + 2)]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
	env2.note_selection_hold{int} {env2.note_selection_hold}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection} ){Builtin, None}, get_control_par(get_ui_id(env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	call ui.update_env{UserDefined, Call}
	call ks.update_button_texts{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function update_ks_pressed_states
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(i{int} {i}  # current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch} )
			set_key_pressed(keyswitches[i{int} {i} ]{int} {keyswitches} , 0){Builtin, None}
			set_key_color(keyswitches[i{int} {i} ]{int} {keyswitches} , KEY_COLOR_RED{int} {KEY_COLOR_RED} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(get_key_triggerstate(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch} ]{int} {keyswitches} ){Builtin, None} = 0)
		set_key_pressed(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch} ]{int} {keyswitches} , 1){Builtin, None}
		set_key_color(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch} ]{int} {keyswitches} , KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{int} {KEY_COLOR_ORANGE} ){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function _allow_groups
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
	idx190{int} {idx190}  := 0
	v00{int} {v00}  := 0
	n40{int} {n40}  := 0
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := 0
	while(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  <= (NUM_GROUPS{int} {NUM_GROUPS}  - 1)) 
		set_event_par_arr(hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(i5{int} {i5}  = 0)
		v00{int} {v00}  := i50{int} {i50} 
		if(art_length[loaded_instruments[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 0)
			if((loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 124) or (loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 125))
					if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} )
						no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
					end if
					if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} )
						no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
					end if
					if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} )
						no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
					end if

				if(((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - last_choir_time_no_engine{int} {last_choir_time_no_engine} ) < 20) and (last_choir_time_no_engine{int} {last_choir_time_no_engine}  # 0))
					dec(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} ){Builtin, None}
				end if
				slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  := random_choir_list[no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} ]{int} {random_choir_list} 
				set_event_par_arr(hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + slots_rrCount[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {slots_rrCount} ){Builtin, None}
				last_choir_time_no_engine{int} {last_choir_time_no_engine}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
				inc(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} ){Builtin, None}
				last_choir_time{int} {last_choir_time}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
				if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > (num_elements(random_choir_list{int[]} {random_choir_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1))
					arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := 0
					arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := 0
					arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := 0
					no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  := 0
				end if
			else
				set_event_par_arr(hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + slots_rrCount[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {slots_rrCount} ){Builtin, None}
				if(rr_nums[loaded_instruments[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums}  = 1)
					slots_rrCount[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  := 0
				else
					random_hold{int} {random_hold}  := slots_rrCount[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {slots_rrCount} 
					while(slots_rrCount[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  = random_hold{int} {random_hold} ) 
						slots_rrCount[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  := random(0, rr_nums[loaded_instruments[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums}  - 1){Builtin, None}
					end while
				end if
			end if
		else
			hold00{int} {hold00}  := loaded_instruments[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} 
			idx190{int} {idx190}  := 0
			while(idx190{int} {idx190}  <= (rr_nums[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {rr_nums}  - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, first_groupID[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + idx190{int} {idx190} ){Builtin, None}
				inc(idx190{int} {idx190} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	else
		if(in_range(i5{int} {i5} , 1, 3){Builtin, None})
			hold00{int} {hold00}  := _assigned_instruments[(i5{int} {i5}  * 5) + i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} 
			if(hold00{int} {hold00}  > 0)
				if(i5{int} {i5}  = 1)
					if(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 14)
						if((loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 124) or (loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 125))
								select(arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx} )
								case 0
									if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
										arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
										arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
										arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
								case 1
									if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
										arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
										arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
										arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
								case 2
									if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
										arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
										arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
										arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
								end select

							if(((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - last_choir_time{int} {last_choir_time} ) < (DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 6000)) and (last_choir_time{int} {last_choir_time}  # 0))
								dec(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} ){Builtin, None}
							end if
							slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  := random_choir_list[arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} ]{int} {random_choir_list} 
						end if
						set_event_par_arr(hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[5 + i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount} ){Builtin, None}
						inc(_slots_chord_subCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {_slots_chord_subCount} ){Builtin, None}
						if(_slots_chord_subCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {_slots_chord_subCount}  >= arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} )
							if((loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 124) or (loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 125))
								inc(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} ){Builtin, None}
								last_choir_time{int} {last_choir_time}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
								if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > (num_elements(random_choir_list{int[]} {random_choir_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1))
									arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := 0
									arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := 0
									arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := 0
									no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  := 0
								end if
							else
								if(rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums}  = 1)
									slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  := 0
								else
									random_hold{int} {random_hold}  := slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount} 
									while(slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  = random_hold{int} {random_hold} ) 
										slots_rrCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {slots_rrCount}  := random(0, rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums}  - 1){Builtin, None}
									end while
								end if
							end if
							_slots_chord_subCount[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {_slots_chord_subCount}  := 0
						end if
					end if
					if(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  # 14)
						if((loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 124) or (loaded_instruments[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  = 125))
								select(arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx} )
								case 0
									if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
										arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
									end if
									if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
										arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}

						set_event_par_arr(env1.rel_note_id{int} {env1.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
						n{int} {n}  := 0
						while(n{int} {n}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
							set_event_par_arr(env1.rel_note_id{int} {env1.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + n{int} {n} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
							inc(n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					_env1.current_engine_notes[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + (s{int} {s}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[i{int} {i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12))]{int} {_env1.current_engine_notes}  := 0
					note_off(_env1.last_note_ids[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_env1.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None}
					_env1.last_note_ids[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_env1.last_note_ids}  := 0
				end if
				inc(s{int} {s} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		stop_wait(env1.callback_id{int} {env1.callback_id} , 0){Builtin, None}
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(env1.note_buffer{int[]} {env1.note_buffer} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			env1.note_buffer[i{int} {i} ]{int} {env1.note_buffer}  := 0
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[i{int} {i} ]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := 0
			if(i{int} {i}  < num_elements(_env1.current_engine_notes{int[]} {_env1.current_engine_notes} ){Builtin, None})
				_env1.current_engine_notes[i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env1.current_engine_notes}  := 0
			end if
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_env1.last_note_ids{int[]} {_env1.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			_env1.last_note_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env1.last_note_ids}  := 0
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_env1.active_notes{int[]} {_env1.active_notes} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			_env1.active_notes[i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env1.active_notes}  := 0
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 10)
			i{int} {i}  := 0
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 99) 
				tbl_env_indicator[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_env_indicator}  := 0
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  = 0)
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
			s{int} {s}  := 0
			while(s{int} {s}  <= 127) 
				if(_env2.last_note_ids[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  # 0)
					mf_set_event_par(_env2.mf_note_ids[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_env2.mf_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - env2.note_entry_time[s{int} {s} ]{int} {env2.note_entry_time} ){Builtin, None}
					if(rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  # -1)
						env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id}  := play_note(s{int} {s}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[i{int} {i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12), 100, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
						set_event_par_arr(env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
						n{int} {n}  := 0
						while(n{int} {n}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
							set_event_par_arr(env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + n{int} {n} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
							inc(n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					_env2.current_engine_notes[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + (s{int} {s}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[i{int} {i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12))]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes}  := 0
					note_off(_env2.last_note_ids[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None}
					_env2.last_note_ids[(i{int} {i}  * 128) + s{int} {s} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  := 0
				end if
				inc(s{int} {s} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		stop_wait(env2.callback_id{int} {env2.callback_id} , 0){Builtin, None}
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(env2.note_buffer{int[]} {env2.note_buffer} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			env2.note_buffer[i{int} {i} ]{int} {env2.note_buffer}  := 0
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[i{int} {i} ]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := 0
			if(i{int} {i}  < num_elements(_env2.current_engine_notes{int[]} {_env2.current_engine_notes} ){Builtin, None})
				_env2.current_engine_notes[i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes}  := 0
			end if
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_env2.last_note_ids{int[]} {_env2.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			_env2.last_note_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  := 0
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_env2.active_notes{int[]} {_env2.active_notes} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			_env2.active_notes[i{int} {i} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  := 0
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 11)
			i{int} {i}  := 0
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 99) 
				tbl_env_indicator[i{int} {i} ]{int} {tbl_env_indicator}  := 0
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	if(((((arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  = 0) and (arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  = 0)) and (arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  = 0)) and (env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  = 0)) and (env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  = 0))
		cursor{int} {cursor}  := 0
	end if
	if(cursor{int} {cursor}  = 0)
		arp1.check_id{int} {arp1.check_id}  := 0
		arp2.check_id{int} {arp2.check_id}  := 0
		arp3.check_id{int} {arp3.check_id}  := 0
		env1.check_id{int} {env1.check_id}  := 0
		env2.check_id{int} {env2.check_id}  := 0
		if(see_page{int} {see_page}  = 4)
			call update_engine_icons{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
	end if
end function

function set_arp1_note_selection
	hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := 0
	i5{int} {i5}  := 0
	while(i5{int} {i5}  <= (arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  - 1)) 
		arp1.selected_notes_buffer[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.note_buffer[i5{int} {i5} ]{int} {arp1.note_buffer} 
		inc(i5{int} {i5} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if((arp1.note_selection{int} {arp1.note_selection}  # 0) and (arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  # 0))
		sort(arp1.selected_notes_buffer{int[]} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} , 1){Builtin, None}
		select(arp1.note_selection_hold{int} {arp1.note_selection_hold} )
		case 1
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 2
			hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  > 1)
				if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  = 2)
					arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} 
				else
					arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  - 2]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
				end if
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 3
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  / 2]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 4
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  > 1)
				arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 5
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 6
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  = 2)
				arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  > 2)
					arp1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
					arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 3
				else
					if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  = 1)
						arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
					end if
				end if
			end if
		case 7
			hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  / 2) - 1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  / 2]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  > 2)
				arp1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} 
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		end select
	else
		if((arp1.note_selection{int} {arp1.note_selection}  = 0) and (arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  # 0))
			arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  := arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function arp1_sort_fill_buffer
	i5{int} {i5}  := i50{int} {i50} 
	hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
	call set_arp1_note_selection{UserDefined, Call}
	while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < 128) 
		if(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} )
			arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered}  := arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer} 
		else
			arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered}  := 0
			arp1.selected_notes_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.selected_notes_buffer}  := 0
		end if
		inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	sort(arp1.ordered{int[]} {arp1.ordered} , 1){Builtin, None}
	arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
	arp1.max_note{int} {arp1.max_note}  := arp1.ordered[0]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
	select(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order} )
	case 2
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 3
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 4
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 2)
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + 1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end select
		end if
	case 5
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 2)
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2) - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end select
		end if
	case 6
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.max_note{int} {arp1.max_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[0]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 3
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
			while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
				arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (2 * arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) - 4
		end if
	case 7
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.max_note{int} {arp1.max_note} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[0]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 3
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
			while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
				arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + 2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (2 * arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) - 4
		end if
	case 8
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.max_note{int} {arp1.max_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[0]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[3]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[0]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 4
			end select
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 3)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + ((arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + 2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					arp1.loop_buffer[((arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + ((arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + 1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (4 * arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) - 10
			end select
		end if
	case 9
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.max_note{int} {arp1.max_note} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.min_note{int} {arp1.min_note} 
			arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[0]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[1]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_buffer[3]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := 4
			end select
		end if
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + 2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 3)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + ((arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					arp1.loop_buffer[((arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + ((arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 2]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (4 * arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) - 10
			end select
		end if
	case 10 to 13
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while((arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		if((arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 11) or (arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 13))
			arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
			while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor} ) 
				arp1.help_buffer[(arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp1.help_buffer}  := arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer} 
				inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
			while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor} ) 
				arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.help_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.help_buffer} 
				inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		if(((arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 12) or (arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 13)) and (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  > 2))
			select(arp1.repeat{int} {arp1.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
				while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  + arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.loop_buffer[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 2) - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer} 
					inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := (arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
			end select
		end if
	case 14
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 15
		arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  := arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  < arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  := arp1.ordered[(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {arp1.ordered} 
			inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end select
end function

function set_arp1_custom_note
	hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := _arp1.custom_pitches[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step} ]{int} {_arp1.custom_pitches} 
	if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 1)
		arp1.note{int} {arp1.note}  := arp1.loop_buffer[arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  + (12 * hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} )
	else
		if(arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			message("Seq Pitch #" & arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step}  & " is at " & hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  & " - Mod 2 = " & (abs(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None} mod 2) & " - Divided by 2 = " & (hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 2)){Builtin, None}
			if(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  >= 0)
				arp1.note{int} {arp1.note}  := arp1.loop_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  mod 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  + (12 * (hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 2))
			else
				arp1.note{int} {arp1.note}  := (arp1.loop_buffer[abs(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None} mod 2]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  - (12 * ((abs(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2))) - 12
			end if
		else
			if(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  >= 0)
				arp1.note{int} {arp1.note}  := arp1.loop_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  mod arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  + (12 * (hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ))
			else
				arp1.note{int} {arp1.note}  := arp1.loop_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  + arp1.selected_cursor{int} {arp1.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp1.loop_buffer}  - 12
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function run_arp1{thread-unsafe}
	arp1.callback_id{int} {arp1.callback_id}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID} 
	while(((cursor{int} {cursor}  > 0) and (arp1.latch_mode{int} {arp1.latch_mode}  # 0)) and (arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  > 0)) 
		arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
		if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  # 0)
			i50{int} {i50}  := i500{int} {i500} 
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} 
			call arp1_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
		if(arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset}  > 0)
			if(arp1.bar_count{int} {arp1.bar_count}  >= arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit} )
				arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  := 0
				arp1.bar_count{int} {arp1.bar_count}  := 0
				arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  := 0
				arp1.n{int} {arp1.n}  := 0
				arp1.s{int} {arp1.s}  := 0
			end if
		end if
		if((see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 7) and (see_page{int} {see_page}  = 6))
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_BG{int} {HIDE_PART_BG} ){Builtin, None}
			arp1.i{int} {arp1.i}  := 0
			while(arp1.i{int} {arp1.i}  <= 31) 
				tbl_rhythm_indicator[arp1.i{int} {arp1.i} ]{int} {tbl_rhythm_indicator}  := 0
				inc(arp1.i{int} {arp1.i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(arp1.rhythm_active{int} {arp1.rhythm_active}  = 1)
				tbl_rhythm_indicator[arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step} ]{int} {tbl_rhythm_indicator}  := 1
			end if
		end if
		if(((_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm}  # 0) and (arp1.rhythm_active{int} {arp1.rhythm_active}  = 1)) or (arp1.rhythm_active{int} {arp1.rhythm_active}  = 0))
			if(arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor}  # 0)
				if((arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 14) and (arp1.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp1.btn_arp_mode}  = 1))
					arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  := 0
					while(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  <= 4) 
						arp1.s{int} {arp1.s}  := 0
						while(arp1.s{int} {arp1.s}  <= 127) 
							if(_arp1.chord_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.chord_buffer}  # 0)
								note_off(_arp1.chord_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.chord_buffer} ){Builtin, None}
								if(_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  > 0)
									if((art_length[_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 2) and in_range(arp1.chord_last_notes[arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {arp1.chord_last_notes} , art_note_ranges[_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_note_ranges} , art_note_ranges[_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  + (num_elements(art_note_ranges{int[]} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None} / 2)]{int} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None})
										arp1.rel_note_id{int} {arp1.rel_note_id}  := play_note(arp1.chord_last_notes[arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {arp1.chord_last_notes} , get_event_par(_arp1.chord_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.chord_buffer} , EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY} ){Builtin, None}, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
										set_event_par_arr(arp1.rel_note_id{int} {arp1.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
										arp1.t{int} {arp1.t}  := 0
										while(arp1.t{int} {arp1.t}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
											set_event_par_arr(arp1.rel_note_id{int} {arp1.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + arp1.t{int} {arp1.t} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
											inc(arp1.t{int} {arp1.t} ){Builtin, None}
										end while
									end if
								end if
								_arp1.chord_buffer[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.chord_buffer}  := 0
								arp1.chord_last_notes[arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {arp1.chord_last_notes}  := -1
							end if
							if(_arp1.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.mf_hybrid_note_ids}  # 0)
								mf_set_event_par(_arp1.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.mf_hybrid_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - _arp1.hybrid_note_entry_time[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.hybrid_note_entry_time} ){Builtin, None}
								_arp1.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  * 128) + arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ]{int} {_arp1.mf_hybrid_note_ids}  := 0
							end if
							inc(arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
						inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
					end while
					arp1.i{int} {arp1.i}  := 0
					while(arp1.i{int} {arp1.i}  < arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor} ) 
						arp1.step_is_note_off{int} {arp1.step_is_note_off}  := 0
