											message("New Midi Note " & arp1.a{int} {arp1.a}  & " " & arp1.note_to_engine{int} {arp1.note_to_engine} ){Builtin, None}
										end if
										midi_pos[arp1.mf_track{int} {arp1.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  := midi_pos[arp1.mf_track{int} {arp1.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  + 1
									end if
								else
									engine_labels_active[arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 0
								end if
								i5{int} {i5}  := arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  + 1
								hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := arp1.note_id{int} {arp1.note_id} 
								i50{int} {i50}  := arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} 
								hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} 
								hold00{int} {hold00}  := i500{int} {i500} 
								idx190{int} {idx190}  := n40{int} {n40} 
								v00{int} {v00}  := v00{int} {v00} 
								n40{int} {n40}  := idx190{int} {idx190} 
								hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
								call _allow_groups{UserDefined, Call}
							end if
							inc(arp1.a{int} {arp1.a} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					if(arp1.s{int} {arp1.s}  >= arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor} )
						arp1.s{int} {arp1.s}  := 0
						arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  := 0
						if(arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave}  > 0)
							inc(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  > arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave} )
								arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  := 0
							end if
						end if
						if(arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave}  < 0)
							dec(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  < arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave} )
								arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  := 0
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
		else
			if((_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm}  = 0) and (arp1.rhythm_active{int} {arp1.rhythm_active}  = 1))
				if(arp1.skip{int} {arp1.skip}  = 1)
					if(arp1.note_repeat{int} {arp1.note_repeat}  # 0)
						if(arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step}  = 0)
							dec(arp1.n{int} {arp1.n} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp1.n{int} {arp1.n}  < 0)
								arp1.n{int} {arp1.n}  := 0
							end if
						end if
					else
						if(arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step}  = 0)
							dec(arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa} ){Builtin, None}
						end if
						if(arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  < 0)
							arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  := 0
						end if
					end if
				else
					if(arp1.note_repeat{int} {arp1.note_repeat}  # 0)
						inc(arp1.n{int} {arp1.n} ){Builtin, None}
					else
						inc(arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa} ){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
				if(arp1.n{int} {arp1.n}  > arp1.repeat_max{int} {arp1.repeat_max} )
					arp1.n{int} {arp1.n}  := 0
					arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  := arp1.s{int} {arp1.s} 
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset}  > 0)
			inc(arp1.bar_count{int} {arp1.bar_count} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if((arp1.note_repeat{int} {arp1.note_repeat}  = 0) and (arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  # 14))
			if(arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  >= arp1.loop_cursor{int} {arp1.loop_cursor} )
				arp1.aa{int} {arp1.aa}  := 0
				if(arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave}  > 0)
					inc(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
					if(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  > arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave} )
						arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  := 0
					end if
				end if
				if(arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave}  < 0)
					dec(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
					if(arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  < arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave} )
						arp1.oct_cursor{int} {arp1.oct_cursor}  := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step} ){Builtin, None}
		if(arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step}  >= arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps} )
			arp1.act_step{int} {arp1.act_step}  := 0
		end if
		select(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} )
		case 0
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 4
		case 1
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 2
		case 2
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH} 
		case 3
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH} 
		case 4
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_QUARTER{int} {DURATION_QUARTER} 
		case 5
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET} 
		case 6
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET} 
		case 7
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET} 
		end select
		if(engine_half_time{int} {engine_half_time}  = 1)
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  * 2
		else
			if(engine_double_time{int} {engine_double_time}  = 1)
				arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  / 2
			end if
		end if
		if((arp1.swing_cursor{int} {arp1.swing_cursor}  mod 2) = 0)
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  + ((arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  * sli_swing{int} {sli_swing} ) / 100)
		else
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  + ((arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  * - sli_swing{int} {sli_swing} ) / 100)
		end if
		inc(arp1.swing_cursor{int} {arp1.swing_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
		if(arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold}  > 0)
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  - arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold} 
		else
			if(arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold}  < 0)
				arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  + arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold} 
			end if
		end if
		if((humanize_bypass{int} {humanize_bypass}  = 0) and (arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold}  # 0))
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  + arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold} 
			arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold}  := 0
		end if
		if((humanize_bypass{int} {humanize_bypass}  = 1) and (humanize_amount{int} {humanize_amount}  # 0))
			arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold}  := random(- humanize_max{int} {humanize_max} , humanize_max{int} {humanize_max} ){Builtin, None}
			arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  := arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length}  + arp1.humanize_hold{int} {arp1.humanize_hold} 
		end if
		select(arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx} )
		case 0
			if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		case 1
			if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		case 2
			if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		end select
		if(arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  # 0)
			wait(arp1.step_length{int} {arp1.step_length} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			wait(1){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end while
end function

function set_arp2_note_selection
	i500{int} {i500}  := 0
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= (arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  - 1)) 
		arp2.selected_notes_buffer[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.note_buffer[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {arp2.note_buffer} 
		inc(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if((arp2.note_selection{int} {arp2.note_selection}  # 0) and (arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  # 0))
		sort(arp2.selected_notes_buffer{int[]} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} , 1){Builtin, None}
		select(arp2.note_selection_hold{int} {arp2.note_selection_hold} )
		case 1
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 2
			i500{int} {i500}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  > 1)
				if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  = 2)
					arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := i500{int} {i500} 
				else
					arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  - 2]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
				end if
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 3
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  / 2]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 4
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  > 1)
				arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 5
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 6
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  = 2)
				arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  > 2)
					arp2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
					arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 3
				else
					if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  = 1)
						arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
					end if
				end if
			end if
		case 7
			i500{int} {i500}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  / 2) - 1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  / 2]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  > 2)
				arp2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := i500{int} {i500} 
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		end select
	else
		if((arp2.note_selection{int} {arp2.note_selection}  = 0) and (arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  # 0))
			arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  := arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function arp2_sort_fill_buffer
	v00{int} {v00}  := hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} 
	n40{int} {n40}  := i500{int} {i500} 
	call set_arp2_note_selection{UserDefined, Call}
	while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < 128) 
		if(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} )
			arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered}  := arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer} 
		else
			arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered}  := 0
			arp2.selected_notes_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.selected_notes_buffer}  := 0
		end if
		inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	sort(arp2.ordered{int[]} {arp2.ordered} , 1){Builtin, None}
	arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
	arp2.max_note{int} {arp2.max_note}  := arp2.ordered[0]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
	select(arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order} )
	case 2
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 3
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 4
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 2)
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + 1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end select
		end if
	case 5
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 2)
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2) - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end select
		end if
	case 6
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.max_note{int} {arp2.max_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[0]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 3
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
			while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
				arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (2 * arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) - 4
		end if
	case 7
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.max_note{int} {arp2.max_note} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[0]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 3
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
			while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
				arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + 2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (2 * arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) - 4
		end if
	case 8
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.max_note{int} {arp2.max_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[0]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[3]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[0]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 4
			end select
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 3)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + ((arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + 2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					arp2.loop_buffer[((arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + ((arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + 1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (4 * arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) - 10
			end select
		end if
	case 9
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.max_note{int} {arp2.max_note} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.min_note{int} {arp2.min_note} 
			arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[0]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[1]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_buffer[3]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := 4
			end select
		end if
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + 2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 3)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + ((arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					arp2.loop_buffer[((arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + ((arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 2]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (4 * arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) - 10
			end select
		end if
	case 10 to 13
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while((arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		if((arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  = 11) or (arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  = 13))
			arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
			while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor} ) 
				arp2.help_buffer[(arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp2.help_buffer}  := arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer} 
				inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
			while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor} ) 
				arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.help_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.help_buffer} 
				inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		if(((arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  = 12) or (arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  = 13)) and (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  > 2))
			select(arp2.repeat{int} {arp2.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
				while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  + arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.loop_buffer[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 2) - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer} 
					inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := (arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
			end select
		end if
	case 14
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 15
		arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  := arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  < arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  := arp2.ordered[(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.ordered} 
			inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end select
end function

function set_arp2_custom_note
	i500{int} {i500}  := _arp2.custom_pitches[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step} ]{int} {_arp2.custom_pitches} 
	if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 1)
		arp2.note{int} {arp2.note}  := arp2.loop_buffer[arp2.s{int} {arp2.s} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  + (12 * i500{int} {i500} )
	else
		if(arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			message("Seq Pitch #" & arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step}  & " is at " & i500{int} {i500}  & " - Mod 2 = " & (abs(i500{int} {i500} ){Builtin, None} mod 2) & " - Divided by 2 = " & (i500{int} {i500}  / 2)){Builtin, None}
			if(i500{int} {i500}  >= 0)
				arp2.note{int} {arp2.note}  := arp2.loop_buffer[i500{int} {i500}  mod 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  + (12 * (i500{int} {i500}  / 2))
			else
				arp2.note{int} {arp2.note}  := (arp2.loop_buffer[abs(i500{int} {i500} ){Builtin, None} mod 2]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  - (12 * ((abs(i500{int} {i500} ){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2))) - 12
			end if
		else
			if(i500{int} {i500}  >= 0)
				arp2.note{int} {arp2.note}  := arp2.loop_buffer[i500{int} {i500}  mod arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  + (12 * (i500{int} {i500}  / arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ))
			else
				arp2.note{int} {arp2.note}  := arp2.loop_buffer[i500{int} {i500}  + arp2.selected_cursor{int} {arp2.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp2.loop_buffer}  - 12
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function run_arp2{thread-unsafe}
	arp2.callback_id{int} {arp2.callback_id}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID} 
	while(((cursor{int} {cursor}  > 0) and (arp2.latch_mode{int} {arp2.latch_mode}  # 0)) and (arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  > 0)) 
		arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
		if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  # 0)
			hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
			i500{int} {i500}  := i50{int} {i50} 
			call arp2_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
		if(arp2.mnu_reset{int} {arp2.mnu_reset}  > 0)
			if(arp2.bar_count{int} {arp2.bar_count}  >= arp2.bar_limit{int} {arp2.bar_limit} )
				arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  := 0
				arp2.bar_count{int} {arp2.bar_count}  := 0
				arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  := 0
				arp2.n{int} {arp2.n}  := 0
				arp2.s{int} {arp2.s}  := 0
			end if
		end if
		if((see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 8) and (see_page{int} {see_page}  = 6))
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_BG{int} {HIDE_PART_BG} ){Builtin, None}
			arp2.i{int} {arp2.i}  := 0
			while(arp2.i{int} {arp2.i}  <= 31) 
				tbl_rhythm_indicator[arp2.i{int} {arp2.i} ]{int} {tbl_rhythm_indicator}  := 0
				inc(arp2.i{int} {arp2.i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(arp2.rhythm_active{int} {arp2.rhythm_active}  = 1)
				tbl_rhythm_indicator[arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step} ]{int} {tbl_rhythm_indicator}  := 1
			end if
		end if
		if(((_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm}  # 0) and (arp2.rhythm_active{int} {arp2.rhythm_active}  = 1)) or (arp2.rhythm_active{int} {arp2.rhythm_active}  = 0))
			if(arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor}  # 0)
				if((arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  = 14) and (arp2.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp2.btn_arp_mode}  = 1))
					arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
					while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  <= 4) 
						arp2.s{int} {arp2.s}  := 0
						while(arp2.s{int} {arp2.s}  <= 127) 
							if(_arp2.chord_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 128) + arp2.s{int} {arp2.s} ]{int} {_arp2.chord_buffer}  # 0)
								note_off(_arp2.chord_buffer[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 128) + arp2.s{int} {arp2.s} ]{int} {_arp2.chord_buffer} ){Builtin, None}
								if(_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  > 0)
									if((art_length[_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 2) and in_range(arp2.chord_last_notes[arp2.s{int} {arp2.s} ]{int} {arp2.chord_last_notes} , art_note_ranges[_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_note_ranges} , art_note_ranges[_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  + (num_elements(art_note_ranges{int[]} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None} / 2)]{int} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None})

						arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  := 0
						while(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  <= 4) 
							if(_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  > 0)
								arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine}  := arp2.note{int} {arp2.note}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12)
								if(arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine}  < 0)
									arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine}  := 0
								else
									if(arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine}  > 127)
										arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine}  := 127
									end if
								end if
								arp2.note_id{int} {arp2.note_id}  := play_note(arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine} , arp2.velo{int} {arp2.velo} , 0, -1){Builtin, None}
								arp2.last_note_ids[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {arp2.last_note_ids}  := arp2.note_id{int} {arp2.note_id} 
								arp2.instr_in_slot{int} {arp2.instr_in_slot}  := _assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} 
								if(in_range(arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine} , art_note_ranges[arp2.instr_in_slot{int} {arp2.instr_in_slot}  - 1]{int} {art_note_ranges} , art_note_ranges[arp2.instr_in_slot{int} {arp2.instr_in_slot}  + ((num_elements(art_note_ranges{int[]} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None} / 2) - 1)]{int} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None})
									engine_labels_active[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 1
									if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} {NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING}  = 1)
										arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track}  := search(loaded_instruments{int[]} {loaded_instruments} , arp2.instr_in_slot{int} {arp2.instr_in_slot} ){Builtin, None}
										midi_ids[arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids}  := mf_insert_event(arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - transport_stamp{int} {transport_stamp} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int} {MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON} , arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine} , arp2.velo{int} {arp2.velo} ){Builtin, None}
										if(art_length[_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 0)
											mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , arp2.mf_length{int} {arp2.mf_length} ){Builtin, None}
										end if
										if(art_length[_assigned_instruments[((arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  # 0)
											_arp2.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 128) + arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp2.mf_hybrid_note_ids}  := midi_ids[arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids} 
											_arp2.hybrid_note_entry_time[(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  * 128) + arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp2.hybrid_note_entry_time}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION} 
											message("New Midi Note " & arp2.a{int} {arp2.a}  & " " & arp2.note_to_engine{int} {arp2.note_to_engine} ){Builtin, None}
										end if
										midi_pos[arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  := midi_pos[arp2.mf_track{int} {arp2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  + 1
									end if
								else
									engine_labels_active[arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 0
								end if
								i5{int} {i5}  := arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx}  + 1
								hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := arp2.note_id{int} {arp2.note_id} 
								i50{int} {i50}  := arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} 
								hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := i50{int} {i50} 
								hold00{int} {hold00}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
								idx190{int} {idx190}  := hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} 
								v00{int} {v00}  := i5{int} {i5} 
								n40{int} {n40}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
								hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := idx190{int} {idx190} 
								call _allow_groups{UserDefined, Call}
							end if
							inc(arp2.a{int} {arp2.a} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					if(arp2.s{int} {arp2.s}  >= arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor} )
						arp2.s{int} {arp2.s}  := 0
						arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  := 0
						if(arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave}  > 0)
							inc(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  > arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave} )
								arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  := 0
							end if
						end if
						if(arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave}  < 0)
							dec(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  < arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave} )
								arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  := 0
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
		else
			if((_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm}  = 0) and (arp2.rhythm_active{int} {arp2.rhythm_active}  = 1))
				if(arp2.skip{int} {arp2.skip}  = 1)
					if(arp2.note_repeat{int} {arp2.note_repeat}  # 0)
						if(arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step}  = 0)
							dec(arp2.n{int} {arp2.n} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp2.n{int} {arp2.n}  < 0)
								arp2.n{int} {arp2.n}  := 0
							end if
						end if
					else
						if(arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step}  = 0)
							dec(arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa} ){Builtin, None}
						end if
						if(arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  < 0)
							arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  := 0
						end if
					end if
				else
					if(arp2.note_repeat{int} {arp2.note_repeat}  # 0)
						inc(arp2.n{int} {arp2.n} ){Builtin, None}
					else
						inc(arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa} ){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
				if(arp2.n{int} {arp2.n}  > arp2.repeat_max{int} {arp2.repeat_max} )
					arp2.n{int} {arp2.n}  := 0
					arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  := arp2.s{int} {arp2.s} 
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(arp2.mnu_reset{int} {arp2.mnu_reset}  > 0)
			inc(arp2.bar_count{int} {arp2.bar_count} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if((arp2.note_repeat{int} {arp2.note_repeat}  = 0) and (arp2.note_order{int} {arp2.note_order}  # 14))
			if(arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  >= arp2.loop_cursor{int} {arp2.loop_cursor} )
				arp2.aa{int} {arp2.aa}  := 0
				if(arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave}  > 0)
					inc(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
					if(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  > arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave} )
						arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  := 0
					end if
				end if
				if(arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave}  < 0)
					dec(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
					if(arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  < arp2.octave{int} {arp2.octave} )
						arp2.oct_cursor{int} {arp2.oct_cursor}  := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step} ){Builtin, None}
		if(arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step}  >= arp2.steps{int} {arp2.steps} )
			arp2.act_step{int} {arp2.act_step}  := 0
		end if
		select(arp2.rate{int} {arp2.rate} )
		case 0
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 4
		case 1
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 2
		case 2
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH} 
		case 3
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH} 
		case 4
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_QUARTER{int} {DURATION_QUARTER} 
		case 5
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET} 
		case 6
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET} 
		case 7
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET} 
		end select
		if(engine_half_time{int} {engine_half_time}  = 1)
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  * 2
		else
			if(engine_double_time{int} {engine_double_time}  = 1)
				arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  / 2
			end if
		end if
		if((arp2.swing_cursor{int} {arp2.swing_cursor}  mod 2) = 0)
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  + ((arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  * sli_swing{int} {sli_swing} ) / 100)
		else
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  + ((arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  * - sli_swing{int} {sli_swing} ) / 100)
		end if
		inc(arp2.swing_cursor{int} {arp2.swing_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
		if(arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold}  > 0)
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  - arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold} 
		else
			if(arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold}  < 0)
				arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  + arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold} 
			end if
		end if
		if((humanize_bypass{int} {humanize_bypass}  = 0) and (arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold}  # 0))
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  + arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold} 
			arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold}  := 0
		end if
		if((humanize_bypass{int} {humanize_bypass}  = 1) and (humanize_amount{int} {humanize_amount}  # 0))
			arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold}  := random(- humanize_max{int} {humanize_max} , humanize_max{int} {humanize_max} ){Builtin, None}
			arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  := arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length}  + arp2.humanize_hold{int} {arp2.humanize_hold} 
		end if
		select(arp2.idx{int} {arp2.idx} )
		case 0
			if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		case 1
			if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		case 2
			if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		end select
		if(arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  # 0)
			wait(arp2.step_length{int} {arp2.step_length} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			wait(1){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end while
end function

function set_arp3_note_selection
	hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := 0
	i50{int} {i50}  := 0
	while(i50{int} {i50}  <= (arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  - 1)) 
		arp3.selected_notes_buffer[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.note_buffer[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {arp3.note_buffer} 
		inc(i50{int} {i50} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if((arp3.note_selection{int} {arp3.note_selection}  # 0) and (arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  # 0))
		sort(arp3.selected_notes_buffer{int[]} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} , 1){Builtin, None}
		select(arp3.note_selection_hold{int} {arp3.note_selection_hold} )
		case 1
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 2
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  > 1)
				if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  = 2)
					arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
				else
					arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  - 2]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
				end if
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 3
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  / 2]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 4
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  > 1)
				arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 5
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 6
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  = 2)
				arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  > 2)
					arp3.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
					arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 3
				else
					if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  = 1)
						arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
					end if
				end if
			end if
		case 7
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  / 2) - 1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  / 2]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  > 2)
				arp3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		end select
	else
		if((arp3.note_selection{int} {arp3.note_selection}  = 0) and (arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  # 0))
			arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  := arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function arp3_sort_fill_buffer
	i5{int} {i5}  := i50{int} {i50} 
	hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
	call set_arp3_note_selection{UserDefined, Call}
	while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < 128) 
		if(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} )
			arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered}  := arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer} 
		else
			arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered}  := 0
			arp3.selected_notes_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.selected_notes_buffer}  := 0
		end if
		inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	sort(arp3.ordered{int[]} {arp3.ordered} , 1){Builtin, None}
	arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
	arp3.max_note{int} {arp3.max_note}  := arp3.ordered[0]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
	select(arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order} )
	case 2
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 3
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 4
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 2)
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + 1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end select
		end if
	case 5
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 2)
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2) - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end select
		end if
	case 6
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.max_note{int} {arp3.max_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[0]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 3
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
			while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
				arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (2 * arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) - 4
		end if
	case 7
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.max_note{int} {arp3.max_note} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[0]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 3
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
			while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
				arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + 2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (2 * arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) - 4
		end if
	case 8
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.max_note{int} {arp3.max_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[0]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[3]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[0]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 4
			end select
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 3)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + ((arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + 2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					arp3.loop_buffer[((arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + ((arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + 1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (4 * arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) - 10
			end select
		end if
	case 9
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 1)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 1
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.max_note{int} {arp3.max_note} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.min_note{int} {arp3.min_note} 
			arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 2
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 3)
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.loop_buffer[0]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[0]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[1]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_buffer[3]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := 4
			end select
		end if
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 3)
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + 2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 3)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + ((arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 3]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					arp3.loop_buffer[((arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + ((arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 2]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (4 * arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) - 10
			end select
		end if
	case 10 to 13
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while((arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 2) + 1]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		if((arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  = 11) or (arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  = 13))
			arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
			while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor} ) 
				arp3.help_buffer[(arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ) - 1]{int} {arp3.help_buffer}  := arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer} 
				inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
			while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor} ) 
				arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.help_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.help_buffer} 
				inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
		if(((arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  = 12) or (arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  = 13)) and (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  > 2))
			select(arp3.repeat{int} {arp3.repeat} )
			case 1
				arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
				while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2)) 
					arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  + arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.loop_buffer[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 2) - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer} 
					inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := (arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  * 2) - 2
			end select
		end if
	case 14
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	case 15
		arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor}  := arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  < arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ) 
			arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  := arp3.ordered[(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  - 1) - arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.ordered} 
			inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end select
end function

function set_arp3_custom_note
	hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := _arp3.custom_pitches[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step} ]{int} {_arp3.custom_pitches} 
	if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 1)
		arp3.note{int} {arp3.note}  := arp3.loop_buffer[arp3.s{int} {arp3.s} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  + (12 * hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} )
	else
		if(arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor}  = 2)
			message("Seq Pitch #" & arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step}  & " is at " & hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  & " - Mod 2 = " & (abs(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None} mod 2) & " - Divided by 2 = " & (hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 2)){Builtin, None}
			if(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  >= 0)
				arp3.note{int} {arp3.note}  := arp3.loop_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  mod 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  + (12 * (hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / 2))
			else
				arp3.note{int} {arp3.note}  := (arp3.loop_buffer[abs(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None} mod 2]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  - (12 * ((abs(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} ){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2))) - 12
			end if
		else
			if(hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  >= 0)
				arp3.note{int} {arp3.note}  := arp3.loop_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  mod arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  + (12 * (hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  / arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ))
			else
				arp3.note{int} {arp3.note}  := arp3.loop_buffer[hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  + arp3.selected_cursor{int} {arp3.selected_cursor} ]{int} {arp3.loop_buffer}  - 12
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function run_arp3{thread-unsafe}
	arp3.callback_id{int} {arp3.callback_id}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID} 
	while(((cursor{int} {cursor}  > 0) and (arp3.latch_mode{int} {arp3.latch_mode}  # 0)) and (arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  > 0)) 
		arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
		if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  # 0)
			i50{int} {i50}  := i500{int} {i500} 
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} 
			call arp3_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
