									arp3.rel_note_id{int} {arp3.rel_note_id}  := play_note(arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} , get_event_par(arp3.last_note_ids[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.last_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY{int} {EVENT_PAR_VELOCITY} ){Builtin, None}, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
									set_event_par_arr(arp3.rel_note_id{int} {arp3.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
									arp3.t{int} {arp3.t}  := 0
									while(arp3.t{int} {arp3.t}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
										set_event_par_arr(arp3.rel_note_id{int} {arp3.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + arp3.t{int} {arp3.t} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
										inc(arp3.t{int} {arp3.t} ){Builtin, None}
									end while
									mf_set_event_par(_arp3.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 128) + arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp3.mf_hybrid_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - _arp3.hybrid_note_entry_time[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 128) + arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp3.hybrid_note_entry_time} ){Builtin, None}
									_arp3.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 128) + arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp3.mf_hybrid_note_ids}  := 0
								end if
							end if
							arp3.last_note_ids[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.last_note_ids}  := -1
						end if
						inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
					end while
					if(arp3.step_is_note_off{int} {arp3.step_is_note_off}  # 1)
						arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  := 0
						while(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  <= 4) 
							if(_assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  > 0)
								arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine}  := arp3.note{int} {arp3.note}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12)
								if(arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine}  < 0)
									arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine}  := 0
								else
									if(arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine}  > 127)
										arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine}  := 127
									end if
								end if
								arp3.note_id{int} {arp3.note_id}  := play_note(arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} , arp3.velo{int} {arp3.velo} , 0, -1){Builtin, None}
								arp3.last_note_ids[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {arp3.last_note_ids}  := arp3.note_id{int} {arp3.note_id} 
								arp3.instr_in_slot{int} {arp3.instr_in_slot}  := _assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} 
								if(in_range(arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} , art_note_ranges[arp3.instr_in_slot{int} {arp3.instr_in_slot}  - 1]{int} {art_note_ranges} , art_note_ranges[arp3.instr_in_slot{int} {arp3.instr_in_slot}  + ((num_elements(art_note_ranges{int[]} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None} / 2) - 1)]{int} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None})
									engine_labels_active[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 1
									if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} {NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING}  = 1)
										arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track}  := search(loaded_instruments{int[]} {loaded_instruments} , arp3.instr_in_slot{int} {arp3.instr_in_slot} ){Builtin, None}
										midi_ids[arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids}  := mf_insert_event(arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - transport_stamp{int} {transport_stamp} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int} {MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON} , arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} , arp3.velo{int} {arp3.velo} ){Builtin, None}
										if(art_length[_assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  = 0)
											mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , arp3.mf_length{int} {arp3.mf_length} ){Builtin, None}
										end if
										if(art_length[_assigned_instruments[((arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1) * 5) + arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {art_length}  # 0)
											_arp3.mf_hybrid_note_ids[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 128) + arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp3.mf_hybrid_note_ids}  := midi_ids[arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids} 
											_arp3.hybrid_note_entry_time[(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  * 128) + arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} ]{int} {_arp3.hybrid_note_entry_time}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION} 
											message("New Midi Note " & arp3.a{int} {arp3.a}  & " " & arp3.note_to_engine{int} {arp3.note_to_engine} ){Builtin, None}
										end if
										midi_pos[arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  := midi_pos[arp3.mf_track{int} {arp3.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  + 1
									end if
								else
									engine_labels_active[arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 0
								end if
								i5{int} {i5}  := arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  + 1
								hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := arp3.note_id{int} {arp3.note_id} 
								i50{int} {i50}  := arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} 
								hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} 
								hold00{int} {hold00}  := i500{int} {i500} 
								idx190{int} {idx190}  := n40{int} {n40} 
								v00{int} {v00}  := v00{int} {v00} 
								n40{int} {n40}  := idx190{int} {idx190} 
								hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
								call _allow_groups{UserDefined, Call}
							end if
							inc(arp3.a{int} {arp3.a} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
					if(arp3.s{int} {arp3.s}  >= arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor} )
						arp3.s{int} {arp3.s}  := 0
						arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa}  := 0
						if(arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave}  > 0)
							inc(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  > arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave} )
								arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  := 0
							end if
						end if
						if(arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave}  < 0)
							dec(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  < arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave} )
								arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  := 0
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
		else
			if((_arp3.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm}  = 0) and (arp3.rhythm_active{int} {arp3.rhythm_active}  = 1))
				if(arp3.skip{int} {arp3.skip}  = 1)
					if(arp3.note_repeat{int} {arp3.note_repeat}  # 0)
						if(arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step}  = 0)
							dec(arp3.n{int} {arp3.n} ){Builtin, None}
							if(arp3.n{int} {arp3.n}  < 0)
								arp3.n{int} {arp3.n}  := 0
							end if
						end if
					else
						if(arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step}  = 0)
							dec(arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa} ){Builtin, None}
						end if
						if(arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa}  < 0)
							arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa}  := 0
						end if
					end if
				else
					if(arp3.note_repeat{int} {arp3.note_repeat}  # 0)
						inc(arp3.n{int} {arp3.n} ){Builtin, None}
					else
						inc(arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa} ){Builtin, None}
					end if
				end if
				if(arp3.n{int} {arp3.n}  > arp3.repeat_max{int} {arp3.repeat_max} )
					arp3.n{int} {arp3.n}  := 0
					arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa}  := arp3.s{int} {arp3.s} 
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(arp3.mnu_reset{int} {arp3.mnu_reset}  > 0)
			inc(arp3.bar_count{int} {arp3.bar_count} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if((arp3.note_repeat{int} {arp3.note_repeat}  = 0) and (arp3.note_order{int} {arp3.note_order}  # 14))
			if(arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa}  >= arp3.loop_cursor{int} {arp3.loop_cursor} )
				arp3.aa{int} {arp3.aa}  := 0
				if(arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave}  > 0)
					inc(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
					if(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  > arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave} )
						arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  := 0
					end if
				end if
				if(arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave}  < 0)
					dec(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
					if(arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  < arp3.octave{int} {arp3.octave} )
						arp3.oct_cursor{int} {arp3.oct_cursor}  := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step} ){Builtin, None}
		if(arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step}  >= arp3.steps{int} {arp3.steps} )
			arp3.act_step{int} {arp3.act_step}  := 0
		end if
		select(arp3.rate{int} {arp3.rate} )
		case 0
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 4
		case 1
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH}  / 2
		case 2
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH} 
		case 3
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH} 
		case 4
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_QUARTER{int} {DURATION_QUARTER} 
		case 5
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET} 
		case 6
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET} 
		case 7
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{int} {DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET} 
		end select
		if(engine_half_time{int} {engine_half_time}  = 1)
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  * 2
		else
			if(engine_double_time{int} {engine_double_time}  = 1)
				arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  / 2
			end if
		end if
		if((arp3.swing_cursor{int} {arp3.swing_cursor}  mod 2) = 0)
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  + ((arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  * sli_swing{int} {sli_swing} ) / 100)
		else
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  + ((arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  * - sli_swing{int} {sli_swing} ) / 100)
		end if
		inc(arp3.swing_cursor{int} {arp3.swing_cursor} ){Builtin, None}
		if(arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold}  > 0)
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  - arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold} 
		else
			if(arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold}  < 0)
				arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  + arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold} 
			end if
		end if
		if((humanize_bypass{int} {humanize_bypass}  = 0) and (arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold}  # 0))
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  + arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold} 
			arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold}  := 0
		end if
		if((humanize_bypass{int} {humanize_bypass}  = 1) and (humanize_amount{int} {humanize_amount}  # 0))
			arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold}  := random(- humanize_max{int} {humanize_max} , humanize_max{int} {humanize_max} ){Builtin, None}
			arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  := arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length}  + arp3.humanize_hold{int} {arp3.humanize_hold} 
		end if
		select(arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx} )
		case 0
			if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} )
				arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		case 1
			if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} )
				arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		case 2
			if(arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp1_choir_random_idx{int} {arp1_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := arp2_choir_random_idx{int} {arp2_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
			if(no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx}  > arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx} )
				arp3_choir_random_idx{int} {arp3_choir_random_idx}  := no_engine_choir_random_idx{int} {no_engine_choir_random_idx} 
			end if
		end select
		if(arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  # 0)
			wait(arp3.step_length{int} {arp3.step_length} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			wait(1){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end while
end function

function set_env1_note_selection
	n40{int} {n40}  := 0
	v00{int} {v00}  := 0
	while(v00{int} {v00}  <= (env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  - 1)) 
		env1.selected_notes_buffer[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.note_buffer[v00{int} {v00} ]{int} {env1.note_buffer} 
		inc(v00{int} {v00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if((env1.note_selection{int} {env1.note_selection}  # 0) and (env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  # 0))
		sort(env1.selected_notes_buffer{int[]} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} , 1){Builtin, None}
		select(env1.note_selection{int} {env1.note_selection} )
		case 1
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  - 1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 2
			n40{int} {n40}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  - 1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  > 1)
				if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  = 2)
					env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := n40{int} {n40} 
				else
					env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  - 2]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
				end if
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 3
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  / 2]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 4
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  > 1)
				env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 5
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 6
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  = 2)
				env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  > 2)
					env1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
					env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 3
				else
					if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  = 1)
						env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
					end if
				end if
			end if
		case 7
			n40{int} {n40}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  / 2) - 1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := env1.selected_notes_buffer[env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  / 2]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  > 2)
				env1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env1.selected_notes_buffer}  := n40{int} {n40} 
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		end select
	else
		if((env1.note_selection{int} {env1.note_selection}  = 0) and (env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  # 0))
			env1.selected_cursor{int} {env1.selected_cursor}  := env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function run_env1{thread-unsafe}

		if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  # 0)

		if((_env1.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + env1.act_step{int} {env1.act_step} ]{int} {_env1.table}  > 0) and (env1.note_state{int} {env1.note_state}  = -1))

								set_event_par_arr(env1.rel_note_id{int} {env1.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
								env1.n{int} {env1.n}  := 0
								while(env1.n{int} {env1.n}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env1.i{int} {env1.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
									set_event_par_arr(env1.rel_note_id{int} {env1.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env1.i{int} {env1.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + env1.n{int} {env1.n} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env1.idx{int} {env1.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env1.i{int} {env1.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
									inc(env1.n{int} {env1.n} ){Builtin, None}
								end while
							end if
							_env1.last_note_ids[(env1.i{int} {env1.i}  * 128) + env1.a{int} {env1.a} ]{int} {_env1.last_note_ids}  := 0
							_env1.active_notes[128 + env1.a{int} {env1.a} ]{int} {_env1.active_notes}  := 0
							_env1.current_engine_notes[(env1.i{int} {env1.i}  * 128) + (env1.a{int} {env1.a}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[env1.i{int} {env1.i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12))]{int} {_env1.current_engine_notes}  := 0
						end if
						inc(env1.a{int} {env1.a} ){Builtin, None}
					end while
					inc(env1.i{int} {env1.i} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end if
		end if
		if(env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  # 0)
			wait(env1.step_length{int} {env1.step_length} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			wait(1){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end while
end function

function set_env2_note_selection
	hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := 0
	i50{int} {i50}  := 0
	while(i50{int} {i50}  <= (env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  - 1)) 
		env2.selected_notes_buffer[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.note_buffer[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {env2.note_buffer} 
		inc(i50{int} {i50} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if((env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection}  # 0) and (env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  # 0))
		sort(env2.selected_notes_buffer{int[]} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} , 1){Builtin, None}
		select(env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection} )
		case 1
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  - 1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 2
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  - 1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  > 1)
				if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  = 2)
					env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
				else
					env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  - 2]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
				end if
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 3
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  / 2]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 4
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  > 1)
				env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		case 5
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
		case 6
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  = 2)
				env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  > 2)
					env2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
					env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 3
				else
					if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  = 1)
						env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
					end if
				end if
			end if
		case 7
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  / 2) - 1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			env2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  / 2]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
			if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  > 2)
				env2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 2
			else
				env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := 1
			end if
		end select
	else
		if((env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection}  = 0) and (env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  # 0))
			env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  := env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor} 
		end if
	end if
end function

function run_env2{thread-unsafe}
	env2.callback_id{int} {env2.callback_id}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID} 
	env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  := -1
	while(((cursor{int} {cursor}  > 0) and (env2.latch_mode{int} {env2.latch_mode}  # 0)) and (env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  > 0)) 
		if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  # 0)
			i50{int} {i50}  := n40{int} {n40} 
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := v00{int} {v00} 
			call set_env2_note_selection{UserDefined, Call}
		end if
		if((_env2.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ]{int} {_env2.table}  > 0) and (env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  = -1))
			env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  := 1
		end if
		if((_env2.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ]{int} {_env2.table}  = 0) and (env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  = 1))
			env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  := -1
		end if
		env2.i{int} {env2.i}  := 0
		while(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  <= 4) 
			if(_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments}  # 0)
				engine_labels_active[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 0
				env2.instr_in_slot{int} {env2.instr_in_slot}  := loaded_instruments[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} 
				env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track}  := search(loaded_instruments{int[]} {loaded_instruments} , env2.instr_in_slot{int} {env2.instr_in_slot} ){Builtin, None}
				mf_insert_event(env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - transport_stamp{int} {transport_stamp} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{int} {MIDI_COMMAND_CC} , dyn_cc_num{int} {dyn_cc_num} , _env2.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ]{int} {_env2.table} ){Builtin, None}
				env2.a{int} {env2.a}  := 0
				while(env2.a{int} {env2.a}  <= (env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  - 1)) 
					env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold}  := env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} 
					if(((_env2.active_notes[env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  = 1) and (_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  = 0)) and (env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  = 1))
						env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note}  := env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12)
						if(env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note}  < 0)
							env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note}  := 0
						else
							if(env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note}  > 127)
								env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note}  := 127
							end if
						end if
						env2.note_id{int} {env2.note_id}  := play_note(env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note} , 50, 0, -1){Builtin, None}
						set_event_mark(env2.note_id{int} {env2.note_id} , 1){Builtin, None}
						_env2.current_engine_notes[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes}  := env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note} 
						_env2.active_notes[128 + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  := 1
						_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  := env2.note_id{int} {env2.note_id} 
						if((add_niente{int} {add_niente}  = 1) and (CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  <= 20))
							env2.add_niente_hold{int} {env2.add_niente_hold}  := - ((20 - CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC} ) * 4000)
							change_vol(env2.note_id{int} {env2.note_id} , env2.add_niente_hold{int} {env2.add_niente_hold} , 0){Builtin, None}
						end if
						i5{int} {i5}  := env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1
						hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := env2.note_id{int} {env2.note_id} 
						i50{int} {i50}  := env2.i{int} {env2.i} 
						hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := n40{int} {n40} 
						hold00{int} {hold00}  := v00{int} {v00} 
						idx190{int} {idx190}  := idx190{int} {idx190} 
						v00{int} {v00}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
						n40{int} {n40}  := i5{int} {i5} 
						hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := hold_value0{int} {hold_value0} 
						call _allow_groups{UserDefined, Call}
						midi_ids[env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids}  := mf_insert_event(env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - transport_stamp{int} {transport_stamp} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int} {MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON} , env2.octaved_note{int} {env2.octaved_note} , 100){Builtin, None}
						_env2.mf_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.mf_note_ids}  := midi_ids[env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_ids} 
						env2.note_entry_time[env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {env2.note_entry_time}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION} 
						midi_pos[env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  := midi_pos[env2.mf_track{int} {env2.mf_track} ]{int} {midi_pos}  + 1
					end if
					if(((_env2.active_notes[env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  = 1) and (_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  # 0)) and (env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  = -1))
						if(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  # 0)
							mf_set_event_par(_env2.mf_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.mf_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - env2.note_entry_time[env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {env2.note_entry_time} ){Builtin, None}
							note_off(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None}
							if(rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  # -1)
								env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id}  := play_note(env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12), 100, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
								set_event_par_arr(env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
								env2.n{int} {env2.n}  := 0
								while(env2.n{int} {env2.n}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
									set_event_par_arr(env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + env2.n{int} {env2.n} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
									inc(env2.n{int} {env2.n} ){Builtin, None}
								end while
							end if
							_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  := 0
							_env2.active_notes[128 + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  := 0
							_env2.current_engine_notes[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.engine_note_hold{int} {env2.engine_note_hold} ]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes}  := 0
						end if
					end if
					env2.m{int} {env2.m}  := 0
					while(env2.m{int} {env2.m}  <= 127) 
						if(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.m{int} {env2.m} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  # 0)
							if(in_range(_env2.current_engine_notes[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.m{int} {env2.m} ]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes} , art_note_ranges[env2.instr_in_slot{int} {env2.instr_in_slot}  - 1]{int} {art_note_ranges} , art_note_ranges[env2.instr_in_slot{int} {env2.instr_in_slot}  + ((num_elements(art_note_ranges{int[]} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None} / 2) - 1)]{int} {art_note_ranges} ){Builtin, None})
								engine_labels_active[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {engine_labels_active}  := 1
							end if
						end if
						inc(env2.m{int} {env2.m} ){Builtin, None}
					end while
					inc(env2.a{int} {env2.a} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
				if(env2.note_selection{int} {env2.note_selection}  > 0)
					if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  > env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor} )
						env2.a{int} {env2.a}  := 0
						while(env2.a{int} {env2.a}  <= 127) 
							if(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  # 0)
								env2.note_check{int} {env2.note_check}  := 1
								env2.m{int} {env2.m}  := 0
								while(env2.m{int} {env2.m}  <= (env2.selected_cursor{int} {env2.selected_cursor}  - 1)) 
									if(env2.a{int} {env2.a}  = env2.selected_notes_buffer[env2.m{int} {env2.m} ]{int} {env2.selected_notes_buffer} )
										env2.note_check{int} {env2.note_check}  := 0
									end if
									inc(env2.m{int} {env2.m} ){Builtin, None}
								end while
								if(env2.note_check{int} {env2.note_check}  = 1)
									mf_set_event_par(_env2.mf_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.mf_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - env2.note_entry_time[env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {env2.note_entry_time} ){Builtin, None}
									note_off(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None}
									_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  := 0
									_env2.active_notes[128 + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  := 0
									_env2.current_engine_notes[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes}  := 0
								end if
							end if
							inc(env2.a{int} {env2.a} ){Builtin, None}
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			inc(env2.i{int} {env2.i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if((see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 11) and (see_page{int} {see_page}  = 6))
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(tbl_env_indicator{int[]} {tbl_env_indicator} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_BG{int} {HIDE_PART_BG} ){Builtin, None}
			env2.i{int} {env2.i}  := 0
			while(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  <= 99) 
				tbl_env_indicator[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {tbl_env_indicator}  := 0
				inc(env2.i{int} {env2.i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(env2.active{int} {env2.active}  = 1)
				tbl_env_indicator[env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ]{int} {tbl_env_indicator}  := 1
			end if
		end if
		env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{int} {DURATION_EIGHTH}  * env2.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env2.eight_notes_bar_amount} 
		select(env2.duration_menu{int} {env2.duration_menu} )
		case 0
			env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  / 2
		case 2
			env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  * 2
		case 3
			env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  * 3
		case 4
			env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  * 4
		end select
		env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  / 100
		if(env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  < 5000)
			env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := 5000
		end if
		if(engine_half_time{int} {engine_half_time}  = 1)
			env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  * 2
		else
			if(engine_double_time{int} {engine_double_time}  = 1)
				env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  := env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length}  / 2
			end if
		end if
		if(env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  = 1)
			if(env2.callback_id{int} {env2.callback_id}  = env1.callback_id{int} {env1.callback_id} )
				set_controller(85, _env2.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ]{int} {_env2.table} ){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(env2.callback_id{int} {env2.callback_id}  = env2.callback_id{int} {env2.callback_id} )
					set_controller(86, _env2.table[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 100) + env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ]{int} {_env2.table} ){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step} ){Builtin, None}
		if(env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step}  >= 100)
			env2.act_step{int} {env2.act_step}  := 0
			if(((env2.retrigger{int} {env2.retrigger}  = 1) and (CC[64]{int} {CC}  < 10)) and (env2.note_state{int} {env2.note_state}  = 1))
				env2.i{int} {env2.i}  := 0
				while(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  <= 4) 
					env2.a{int} {env2.a}  := 0
					while(env2.a{int} {env2.a}  <= 127) 
						if(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  # 0)
							mf_set_event_par(_env2.mf_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.mf_note_ids} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH} , NI_SONG_POSITION{int} {NI_SONG_POSITION}  - env2.note_entry_time[EVENT_NOTE{int} {EVENT_NOTE} ]{int} {env2.note_entry_time} ){Builtin, None}
							note_off(_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids} ){Builtin, None}
							if(rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  # -1)
								env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id}  := play_note(env2.a{int} {env2.a}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12), 100, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
								set_event_par_arr(env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
								env2.n{int} {env2.n}  := 0
								while(env2.n{int} {env2.n}  <= (rel_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rel_nums}  - 1)) 
									set_event_par_arr(env2.rel_note_id{int} {env2.rel_note_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, (first_groupID[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {first_groupID}  + env2.n{int} {env2.n} ) + rr_nums[_assigned_instruments[((env2.idx{int} {env2.idx}  + 1) * 5) + env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {_assigned_instruments} ]{int} {rr_nums} ){Builtin, None}
									inc(env2.n{int} {env2.n} ){Builtin, None}
								end while
							end if
							_env2.last_note_ids[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.last_note_ids}  := 0
							_env2.active_notes[128 + env2.a{int} {env2.a} ]{int} {_env2.active_notes}  := 0
							_env2.current_engine_notes[(env2.i{int} {env2.i}  * 128) + (env2.a{int} {env2.a}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[env2.i{int} {env2.i} ]{int} {assigned_octave_shifts}  * 12))]{int} {_env2.current_engine_notes}  := 0
						end if
						inc(env2.a{int} {env2.a} ){Builtin, None}
					end while
					inc(env2.i{int} {env2.i} ){Builtin, None}
				end while
			end if
		end if
		if(env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  # 0)
			wait(env2.step_length{int} {env2.step_length} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			wait(1){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end while
end function

			free_slot3_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot3_notes_buffer}  := free_slot3_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot3_notes_buffer}

	else

			free_selected_cursors[2]{int} {free_selected_cursors}  := free_cursor{int} {free_cursor} 
		end if
	end if
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= (free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  - 1))

		inc(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}

	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= 127)

	if((get_control_par(mnu_free_selection[3]{int} {mnu_free_selection} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} # 0) and (free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  # 0))

			end if
		case 3
			free_slot4_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer}  := free_slot4_notes_buffer[free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  / 2]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer} 
			free_selected_cursors[3]{int} {free_selected_cursors}  := 1
		case 4

				else
					if(free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  = 1)
						free_selected_cursors[3]{int} {free_selected_cursors}  := 1
					end if
				end if
			end if
		case 6
			free_slot4_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer}  := free_slot4_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer} 
			if(free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  > 1)
				free_slot4_notes_buffer[1]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer}  := free_slot4_notes_buffer[1]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer} 
				free_selected_cursors[3]{int} {free_selected_cursors}  := 2
			else
				free_selected_cursors[3]{int} {free_selected_cursors}  := 1
			end if
		case 7
			free_slot4_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer}  := free_slot4_notes_buffer[0]{int} {free_slot4_notes_buffer}

		end select
	else
		if((get_control_par(mnu_free_selection[3]{int} {mnu_free_selection} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 0) and (free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  # 0))
			free_selected_cursors[3]{int} {free_selected_cursors}  := free_cursor{int} {free_cursor} 
		end if
	end if
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= (free_cursor{int} {free_cursor}  - 1)) 
		free_slot5_notes_buffer[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {free_slot5_notes_buffer}  := free_note_buffer[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {free_note_buffer} 
		inc(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
	end while

end function

function scanning_automation
	if((preset_scan_info{int} {preset_scan_info}  = 0) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int} {btn_scan_presets} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1))
		if(preset_scan{int} {preset_scan}  = 1)
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_animation{int} {lbl_scan_animation} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		if((preset_scan{int} {preset_scan}  = 0) and in_range(preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count} , 1, 50){Builtin, None})
			set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_animation{int} {lbl_scan_animation} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count} ){Builtin, None}
			if(preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  >= 50)
				preset_scan_info{int} {preset_scan_info}  := 1
				preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  := 0
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int} {btn_scan_presets} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None}
				call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, Call}
			end if
		end if
		preset.frame_rate{int} {preset.frame_rate}  := (preset.frame_rate{int} {preset.frame_rate}  + 1) mod 1
		preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  := (preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{int} {preset.frame_rate} , 31){Builtin, None} + 1)) mod 51
	else
		if((preset_scan_info{int} {preset_scan_info}  = 1) and (preset_scan{int} {preset_scan}  = 0))
			preset.frame_rate{int} {preset.frame_rate}  := (preset.frame_rate{int} {preset.frame_rate}  + 1) mod 1
			preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  := (preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{int} {preset.frame_rate} , 31){Builtin, None} + 1)) mod 100
			if(preset.frame_count{int} {preset.frame_count}  >= 99)
				preset_scan_info{int} {preset_scan_info}  := 0
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int} {lbl_scan_info} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_presetcount{int} {lbl_presetcount} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} {NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS}  & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{int} {NUM_PRESETS} ){Builtin, None}
			else
				if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_scan_presets{int} {btn_scan_presets} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT} ){Builtin, None} = 0)
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int} {lbl_scan_info} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "User Presets found: " & preset.usr_display_num{int} {preset.usr_display_num} ){Builtin, None}
				else
					set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_scan_info{int} {lbl_scan_info} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "Files recovered: " & preset.usr_display_num{int} {preset.usr_display_num} ){Builtin, None}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function _on_controller
	v00{int} {v00}  := 0
	idx18{int} {idx18}  := 0
	while(idx18{int} {idx18}  <= 31) 
		if(_arp1.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.velo_default_rhythm}  # 0)
			if(CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  <= 100)
				if(_arp1.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.velo_default_rhythm}  # 1)
					_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm}  := (_arp1.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.velo_default_rhythm}  * CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC} ) / 100
					if(_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm}  < 2)
						_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm}  := 2
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  > 100)
				if(_arp1.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.velo_default_rhythm}  # 1)
					v00{int} {v00}  := _arp1.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.velo_default_rhythm}  + (CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  - 100)
					if(v00{int} {v00}  > 127)
						v00{int} {v00}  := 127
					end if
					_arp1.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp1.rhythm}  := v00{int} {v00} 
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(idx18{int} {idx18} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	idx18{int} {idx18}  := 0
	while(idx18{int} {idx18}  <= 31) 
		if(_arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm}  # 0)
			if(CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  <= 100)
				if(_arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm}  # 1)
					_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm}  := (_arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm}  * CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC} ) / 100
					if(_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm}  < 2)
						_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm}  := 2
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  > 100)
				if(_arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm}  # 1)
					v00{int} {v00}  := _arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm}  + (CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  - 100)
					if(v00{int} {v00}  > 127)
						v00{int} {v00}  := 127
					end if
					_arp2.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp2.rhythm}  := v00{int} {v00} 
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(idx18{int} {idx18} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	idx18{int} {idx18}  := 0
	while(idx18{int} {idx18}  <= 31) 
		if(_arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm}  # 0)
			if(CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  <= 100)
				if(_arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm}  # 1)
					_arp3.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm}  := (_arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm}  * CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC} ) / 100
					if(_arp3.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm}  < 2)
						_arp3.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm}  := 2
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  > 100)
				if(_arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm}  # 1)
					v00{int} {v00}  := _arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm}  + (CC[dyn_cc_menu{int} {dyn_cc_menu} ]{int} {CC}  - 100)
					if(v00{int} {v00}  > 127)
						v00{int} {v00}  := 127
					end if
					_arp3.rhythm[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 32) + idx18{int} {idx18} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm}  := v00{int} {v00} 
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(idx18{int} {idx18} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	idx18{int} {idx18}  := 0
	while(idx18{int} {idx18}  <= 31) 
		if(idx18{int} {idx18}  < cur_arp_steps{int} {cur_arp_steps} )
			select(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage} )
			case 7

function reset_arp_env_view
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		set_control_par(engine_subpage_buttons[i{int} {i} ]{int} {engine_subpage_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function hide_instr_buttons
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.art_page_left{int} {browser.art_page_left} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.art_page_right{int} {browser.art_page_right} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.art_page_label{int} {browser.art_page_label} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(browser.instr_buttons{int[]} {browser.instr_buttons} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_control_par(browser.instr_buttons[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.instr_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function get_instr_id_per_section
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(browser.section_buttons{int[]} {browser.section_buttons} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		if(get_control_par(browser.section_buttons[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)
			message("Instrument per Section: " & browser.instr_per_section[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section} ){Builtin, None}
			hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
			while(hold00{int} {hold00}  <= (browser.instr_per_section[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section}  - 1)) 
				browser.instr_ids_per_section[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {browser.instr_ids_per_section}  := hold00{int} {hold00}  + bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} 
				message("Instr Ids: " & browser.instr_ids_per_section[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {browser.instr_ids_per_section}  & " - a: " & hold00{int} {hold00}  & " - s: " & bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  & " - A + S: " & (hold00{int} {hold00}  + bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} )){Builtin, None}
				inc(hold00{int} {hold00} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		else
			bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  + browser.instr_per_section[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section} 
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function show_instr_button
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
	escape00{int} {escape00}  := 0
	call hide_instr_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset}  := 0
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
	while(hold00{int} {hold00}  <= (num_elements(browser.instr_per_section{int[]} {browser.instr_per_section} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		if(get_control_par(browser.section_buttons[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)
			browser.current_instr_num{int} {browser.current_instr_num}  := browser.instr_per_section[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section} 
			bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
			while(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  <= (num_elements(browser.instr_buttons{int[]} {browser.instr_buttons} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
				if(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  < browser.current_instr_num{int} {browser.current_instr_num} )
					set_control_par(browser.instr_buttons[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {browser.instr_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
					set_control_par_str(browser.instr_buttons[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {browser.instr_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , instr_names[browser.art_id_on_button[browser.instr_art_offset[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  + escape00{int} {escape00} ]{int} {browser.instr_art_offset} ]{int} {browser.art_id_on_button} ]{string} {instr_names} ){Builtin, None}
					if(hold00{int} {hold00}  = 3)
						set_control_par_str(browser.instr_buttons[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {browser.instr_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , browser.perc_type_names[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{string} {browser.perc_type_names} ){Builtin, None}
					end if
					message("Instrument Name: " & instr_names[browser.art_id_on_button[browser.instr_art_offset[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  + escape00{int} {escape00} ]{int} {browser.instr_art_offset} ]{int} {browser.art_id_on_button} ]{string} {instr_names} ){Builtin, None}
				end if
				inc(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
			if(browser.instr_per_section[hold00{int} {hold00} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section}  > num_elements(browser.instr_buttons{int[]} {browser.instr_buttons} ){Builtin, None})
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}

function update_instr_scroll
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := 0
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := 0
	escape00{int} {escape00}  := 0
	while(escape00{int} {escape00}  <= (num_elements(browser.instr_per_section{int[]} {browser.instr_per_section} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		if(get_control_par(browser.section_buttons[escape00{int} {escape00} ]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)

			while(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  <= (num_elements(browser.instr_buttons{int[]} {browser.instr_buttons} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
				set_control_par_str(browser.instr_buttons[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {browser.instr_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , instr_names[browser.art_id_on_button[browser.instr_art_offset[(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  + hold00{int} {hold00} ) + browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset} ]{int} {browser.instr_art_offset} ]{int} {browser.art_id_on_button} ]{string} {instr_names} ){Builtin, None}
				message("Okaaaay: " & browser.instr_art_offset[(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  + hold00{int} {hold00} ) + browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset} ]{int} {browser.instr_art_offset} ){Builtin, None}
				message("Check Check: " & get_control_par_str(browser.instr_buttons[bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} ]{int} {browser.instr_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} ){Builtin, None} & " - n: " & bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  & " - s: " & hold00{int} {hold00}  & " - scroll instr Offset: " & browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset} ){Builtin, None}

end function

function hide_art_buttons
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(browser.art_buttons{int[]} {browser.art_buttons} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_control_par(browser.art_buttons[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.art_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(browser.art_buttons[i{int} {i} ]{int} {browser.art_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
end function

function go_to_active_art
	i500{int} {i500}  := 0
	hold_value0{int} {hold_value0}  := 0
	i50{int} {i50}  := 0
	n40{int} {n40}  := 0
	idx190{int} {idx190}  := browser.active_instr_slot{int} {browser.active_instr_slot} 
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	first_art_in_inst0{int} {first_art_in_inst0}  := 0
	last_art_in_inst0{int} {last_art_in_inst0}  := 0
	call hide_instr_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
	call remote_instr_category_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
	call remote_instr_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
	call remote_art_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
	if(loaded_instruments[idx190{int} {idx190} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  # 0)
		i500{int} {i500}  := search(browser.art_id_on_button{int[]} {browser.art_id_on_button} , loaded_instruments[idx190{int} {idx190} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} ){Builtin, None}
		if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , 0, browser.section_last_idx[0]{int} {browser.section_last_idx}  - 1){Builtin, None})
			set_control_par(browser.section_buttons[0]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 1){Builtin, None}
			browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx}  := 0
		else
			if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , browser.section_last_idx[0]{int} {browser.section_last_idx} , browser.section_last_idx[1]{int} {browser.section_last_idx}  - 1){Builtin, None})
				set_control_par(browser.section_buttons[1]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 1){Builtin, None}
				browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx}  := 1
			else
				if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , browser.section_last_idx[1]{int} {browser.section_last_idx} , browser.section_last_idx[2]{int} {browser.section_last_idx}  - 1){Builtin, None})
					set_control_par(browser.section_buttons[2]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 1){Builtin, None}
					browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx}  := 2
				else
					if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , browser.section_last_idx[2]{int} {browser.section_last_idx} , browser.section_last_idx[3]{int} {browser.section_last_idx}  - 1){Builtin, None})
						set_control_par(browser.section_buttons[3]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 1){Builtin, None}
						browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx}  := 3
					else
						if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , browser.section_last_idx[3]{int} {browser.section_last_idx} , browser.section_last_idx[4]{int} {browser.section_last_idx}  - 1){Builtin, None})
							set_control_par(browser.section_buttons[4]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 1){Builtin, None}
							browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx}  := 4
						else
							if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , browser.section_last_idx[4]{int} {browser.section_last_idx} , browser.section_last_idx[5]{int} {browser.section_last_idx}  - 1){Builtin, None})
								set_control_par(browser.section_buttons[5]{int} {browser.section_buttons} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 1){Builtin, None}
								browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx}  := 5
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := s60{int} {s60} 
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := a120{int} {a120} 
		call get_instr_id_per_section{UserDefined, Call}
		i50{int} {i50}  := 0
		while(i50{int} {i50}  <= (browser.instr_per_section[browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section}  - 1)) 
			first_art_in_inst0{int} {first_art_in_inst0}  := browser.instr_art_offset[browser.instr_ids_per_section[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {browser.instr_ids_per_section} ]{int} {browser.instr_art_offset} 
			last_art_in_inst0{int} {last_art_in_inst0}  := browser.instr_art_offset[browser.instr_ids_per_section[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {browser.instr_ids_per_section}  + 1]{int} {browser.instr_art_offset}  - 1
			if(in_range(i500{int} {i500} , first_art_in_inst0{int} {first_art_in_inst0} , last_art_in_inst0{int} {last_art_in_inst0} ){Builtin, None})
				hold00{int} {hold00}  := s60{int} {s60} 
				bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := a120{int} {a120} 
				escape00{int} {escape00}  := s70{int} {s70} 
				call show_instr_button{UserDefined, Call}
				browser.instr_btn_states[i50{int} {i50} ]{int} {browser.instr_btn_states}  := 1
				n40{int} {n40}  := real_to_int(floor(1e+06 - ((1e+06 / int_to_real(browser.instr_per_section[browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section} ){Builtin, None}) * int_to_real(i50{int} {i50}  + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				if(n40{int} {n40}  > 1000000)
					browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar}  := 1000000
				else
					if(n40{int} {n40}  < 0)
						browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar}  := 0
					else
						browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar}  := n40{int} {n40} 
					end if
				end if
				browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset}  := (1000000 - browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar} ) / (1000000 / (browser.instr_per_section[browser.type_idx{int} {browser.type_idx} ]{int} {browser.instr_per_section}  - num_elements(browser.instr_buttons{int[]} {browser.instr_buttons} ){Builtin, None}))
				if(browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset}  < 0)
					browser.scroll_instr_offset{int} {browser.scroll_instr_offset}  := 0
				end if
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None} + ((browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} {browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height}  - browser.handle_size_instr{int} {browser.handle_size_instr} ) - ((browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar}  * (browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} {browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height}  - browser.handle_size_instr{int} {browser.handle_size_instr} )) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
				escape00{int} {escape00}  := a120{int} {a120} 
				bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := s60{int} {s60} 
				hold00{int} {hold00}  := s70{int} {s70} 
				call update_instr_scroll{UserDefined, Call}
				hold00{int} {hold00}  := s70{int} {s70} 
				bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := s60{int} {s60} 
				escape00{int} {escape00}  := a120{int} {a120} 
				idx18{int} {idx18}  := art_btn_num00{int} {art_btn_num00} 
				hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := hold10{int} {hold10} 
				allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := scroll_idx_hold00{int} {scroll_idx_hold00} 
				v00{int} {v00}  := s90{int} {s90} 
				i5{int} {i5}  := n70{int} {n70} 
				call check_loaded_art{UserDefined, Call}
				n40{int} {n40}  := real_to_int(floor(1e+06 - ((1e+06 / int_to_real(last_art_in_inst0{int} {last_art_in_inst0}  - first_art_in_inst0{int} {first_art_in_inst0} ){Builtin, None}) * int_to_real(i500{int} {i500}  - first_art_in_inst0{int} {first_art_in_inst0} ){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
				if(n40{int} {n40}  > 1000000)
					browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar}  := 1000000
				else
					if(n40{int} {n40}  < 0)
						browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar}  := 0
					else
						browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar}  := n40{int} {n40} 
					end if
				end if
				set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} , get_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{int} {CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y} ){Builtin, None} + ((browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} {browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height}  - browser.handle_size_art{int} {browser.handle_size_art} ) - ((browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar}  * (browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} {browser.brwsr_sli_scroll_height}  - browser.handle_size_art{int} {browser.handle_size_art} )) / 1000000))){Builtin, None}
			end if
			inc(i50{int} {i50} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := a120{int} {a120} 
		bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := s60{int} {s60} 
		escape00{int} {escape00}  := s70{int} {s70} 
		idx18{int} {idx18}  := art_btn_num00{int} {art_btn_num00} 
		hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := hold10{int} {hold10} 
		allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := scroll_idx_hold00{int} {scroll_idx_hold00} 
		v00{int} {v00}  := s90{int} {s90} 
		i5{int} {i5}  := n70{int} {n70} 
		call check_loaded_art{UserDefined, Call}
	else
		call hide_art_buttons{UserDefined, Call}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_instr_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_instr_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_instr_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.sli_art_scrollbar{int} {browser.sli_art_scrollbar} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle{int} {browser.lbl_art_scrollhandle} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function show_hide_free_selection
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(assign_slot_menus{int[]} {assign_slot_menus} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		if(get_control_par(assign_slot_menus[i{int} {i} ]{int} {assign_slot_menus} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 0)
			set_control_par(mnu_free_selection[i{int} {i} ]{int} {mnu_free_selection} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_free_selection[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_free_selection} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_control_par(mnu_free_selection[i{int} {i} ]{int} {mnu_free_selection} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
			set_control_par(lbl_free_selection[i{int} {i} ]{int} {lbl_free_selection} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function kill_preview
	fade_out(preview_id[preview_counter{int} {preview_counter} ]{int} {preview_id} , 400000, 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function play_preview{thread-unsafe}
	if(sli_preset_preview_vol{int} {sli_preset_preview_vol}  > 0)
		call kill_preview{UserDefined, Call}
		preview_counter{int} {preview_counter}  := (preview_counter{int} {preview_counter}  + 1) mod num_elements(preview_id{int[]} {preview_id} ){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME{int} {ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME} , vol_arr[(sli_preset_preview_vol{int} {sli_preset_preview_vol}  * - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_preset_browser{int} {UI_preset_browser} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} ){Builtin, None} - HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None} - 1, 31){Builtin, None}) / 1000]{int} {vol_arr} , preview_group_idx{int} {preview_group_idx} , 0, -1){Builtin, None}
		preview_id[preview_counter{int} {preview_counter} ]{int} {preview_id}  := play_note(lsb(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}, msb(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None} + 1, 0, -1){Builtin, None}
		set_event_par_arr(preview_id[preview_counter{int} {preview_counter} ]{int} {preview_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None}
		set_event_par_arr(preview_id[preview_counter{int} {preview_counter} ]{int} {preview_id} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, preview_group_idx{int} {preview_group_idx} ){Builtin, None}
		wait(1){Builtin, None}
		preview_zone_id0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {preview_zone_id0}  := get_event_par(preview_id[preview_counter{int} {preview_counter} ]{int} {preview_id} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None}
		message("lsb: " & lsb(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None} & " msb+1: " & (msb(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None} + 1) & " groups: " & get_sample(preview_zone_id0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {preview_zone_id0} , NI_FILE_NAME{int} {NI_FILE_NAME} ){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function preset_array_load
	escape00{int} {escape00}  := 0
	set_control_par(idx18{int} {idx18} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array} ){Builtin, None}
	if(get_ui_id(idx18{int} {idx18} ){Builtin, None} # get_ui_id(mixer.rev_bypass{int} {mixer.rev_bypass} ){Builtin, None})
		escape00{int} {escape00}  := search(core.control_ids{int[]} {core.control_ids} , get_ui_id(idx18{int} {idx18} ){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
		if(escape00{int} {escape00}  # -1)
			set_engine_par(core.engine_par[escape00{int} {escape00} ]{int} {core.engine_par} , idx18{int} {idx18} , -1, core.slot[escape00{int} {escape00} ]{int} {core.slot} , core.generic[escape00{int} {escape00} ]{int} {core.generic} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	else
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1 - mixer.rev_bypass{int} {mixer.rev_bypass} , -1, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
	end if
	inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
end function

function mirror_comp_settings
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= 4) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1 - mixer.comp_bypass{int} {mixer.comp_bypass} , -1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD} , mixer.comp_threshold{int} {mixer.comp_threshold} , -1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP} , mixer.comp_makeup{int} {mixer.comp_makeup} , -1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1, -1, 2, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1, -1, 3, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}

			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1 - mixer.eq_1{int} {mixer.eq_1} , -1, 2, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , 1 - mixer.eq_2{int} {mixer.eq_2} , -1, 3, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end if

end function

function update_env_time_signature
	select(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} )
	case 0
		env1.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env1.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 8
		env2.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env2.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 8
	case 1
		env1.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env1.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 6
		env2.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env2.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 6
	case 2
		env1.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env1.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 6
		env2.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env2.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 6
	case 3
		env1.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env1.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 5
		env2.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env2.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 5
	case 4
		env1.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env1.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 7
		env2.eight_notes_bar_amount{int} {env2.eight_notes_bar_amount}  := 7
	end select
end function

function load_preset{thread-unsafe}
	preset.is_loading{int} {preset.is_loading}  := 1
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := preset_tags0[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {preset_tags0} 
	hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := preset_tags1[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {preset_tags1} 
	presetmask[0]{int} {presetmask}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
	presetmask[1]{int} {presetmask}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
	preset.n{int} {preset.n}  := ((sh_right(presetmask[0]{int} {presetmask} , 26){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int} {preset.allow_user} ) * 5
	inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
	cursor{int} {cursor}  := 0
	arp1.cursor{int} {arp1.cursor}  := 0
	arp2.cursor{int} {arp2.cursor}  := 0
	arp3.cursor{int} {arp3.cursor}  := 0
	env1.cursor{int} {env1.cursor}  := 0
	env2.cursor{int} {env2.cursor}  := 0
	call check_cursor_amount{UserDefined, Call}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(loaded_instruments{int[]} {loaded_instruments} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		loaded_instruments[i{int} {i} ]{int} {loaded_instruments}  := preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array} 
		inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(preset.array[0]{int} {preset.array}  < 7)
		current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  := 0
	end if
	if((preset.array[0]{int} {preset.array}  = 5) or (preset.array[0]{int} {preset.array}  = 6))
		message("Preset from TOC3"){Builtin, None}

		_SEQ_PARAMETERS[(arp3.idx{int} {arp3.idx}  * 9) + 2]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS}  := arp3.skip{int} {arp3.skip}

	preset.is_loading{int} {preset.is_loading}  := 0

function get_category_idx
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while((i{int} {i}  < num_elements(category_accum{int[]} {category_accum} ){Builtin, None}) and (category_accum[i{int} {i} ]{int} {category_accum}  <= i5{int} {i5} )) 
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	i500{int} {i500}  := - (- (i{int} {i}  - 1) .and. sh_right(- (i{int} {i}  - 1), 31){Builtin, None})
end function
