function doubleclick_check{thread-unsafe}
	wait(402000){Builtin, None}
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - clicktime[1]{int} {clicktime} ) > 400)
		set_control_par(double_click_control1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {double_click_control1} , CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int} {HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL} ){Builtin, None}
		clicktime[2]{int} {clicktime}  := 0
	end if
end function

function preset_array_add
	preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := get_control_par(bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}
	inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
end function

function save_preset
	preset.n{int} {preset.n}  := (saving_preset{int} {saving_preset}  * preset.allow_user{int} {preset.allow_user} ) * 5
	preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int} {PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION} 
	inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := 0
	while(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  <= (num_elements(loaded_instruments{int[]} {loaded_instruments} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := loaded_instruments[allowed00{int} {allowed00} ]{int} {loaded_instruments} 
		inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := 0
	while(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  <= (num_elements(_SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[allowed00{int} {allowed00} ]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
		inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := 0
	while(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  <= (num_elements(_ENV_PARAMETERS{int[]} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := _ENV_PARAMETERS[allowed00{int} {allowed00} ]{int} {_ENV_PARAMETERS} 
		inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := 0
	while(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  <= 4) 
		ii{int} {ii}  := 0
		while(ii{int} {ii}  <= 31) 
			preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := _arp1.velo_default_rhythm[(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  * 32) + ii{int} {ii} ]{int} {_arp1.velo_default_rhythm} 
			inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int} {ii} ){Builtin, None}

		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}

			inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int} {ii} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := 0
	while(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  <= 4) 
		ii{int} {ii}  := 0

			preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := _arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  * 32) + ii{int} {ii} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm}

			inc(ii{int} {ii} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	allowed00{int} {allowed00}  := 0

			preset.array[preset.n{int} {preset.n} ]{int} {preset.array}  := _arp2.custom_pitches[(allowed00{int} {allowed00}  * 32) + ii{int} {ii} ]{int} {_arp2.custom_pitches} 
			inc(preset.n{int} {preset.n} ){Builtin, None}
			inc(ii{int} {ii} ){Builtin, None}

		inc(allowed00{int} {allowed00} ){Builtin, None}

function on_saving_preset_dialog
	idx18{int} {idx18}  := 1
	call visibility.preset.save.dialog{UserDefined, Call}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(UI_preset_save_dialog{int} {UI_preset_save_dialog} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , hide_state[1]{int} {hide_state} ){Builtin, None}
	if(preset.idx{int} {preset.idx}  # -1)
		hold00{int} {hold00}  := preset_tags0[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {preset_tags0} 
		hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := preset_tags1[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {preset_tags1} 
		presetmask[0]{int} {presetmask}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
		presetmask[1]{int} {presetmask}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
		select(saving_preset{int} {saving_preset} )
		case 2
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string} {txt_presetname} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{string} {preset_title_array} ){Builtin, None}
		case 1
			if(((sh_right(presetmask[0]{int} {presetmask} , 26){Builtin, None} .and. 1) * preset.allow_user{int} {preset.allow_user} ) = 0)
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string} {txt_presetname} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{string} {preset_title_array}  & " (User)"){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(txt_presetname{string} {txt_presetname} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , preset_title_array[search(preset_numbers_array{int[]} {preset_numbers_array} , preset.idx{int} {preset.idx} ){Builtin, None}]{string} {preset_title_array} ){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end select
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_warning{int} {lbl_warning} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , "Choose a selection of tags"){Builtin, None}
		add_text_line(lbl_warning{int} {lbl_warning} , "that apply to your Session"){Builtin, None}
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(lbl_warning{int} {lbl_warning} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE} , fonts.base_font[1]{int} {fonts.base_font} ){Builtin, None}
		lib.i{int} {lib.i}  := 0
		while(lib.i{int} {lib.i}  <= ((64 - ((64 - num_elements(tag_button_array{int[]} {tag_button_array} ){Builtin, None}) .and. sh_right(num_elements(tag_button_array{int[]} {tag_button_array} ){Builtin, None} - 64, 31){Builtin, None})) - 1)) 
			hold_value00{int} {hold_value00}  := lib.i{int} {lib.i}

		if((core.engine_par[s{int} {s} ]{int} {core.engine_par}  # ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} ) and (core.engine_par[s{int} {s} ]{int} {core.engine_par}  # ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS} ))

		end if
		if(search(mixer.vol_knob_ids{int[]} {mixer.vol_knob_ids} , ctrl_id{int} {ctrl_id} ){Builtin, None} # -1)

			wait(10000){Builtin, None}
		end while
		if(NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  = last_cb0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {last_cb0} )
			set_control_par_str(ctrl_label{int} {ctrl_label} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , ctrl_label_text{string} {ctrl_label_text} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
end function

function set_current_control0{thread-unsafe}
	ctrl{int} {ctrl}  := double_click_control1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {double_click_control1} 
	ctrl_id{int} {ctrl_id}  := get_ui_id(double_click_control1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {double_click_control1} ){Builtin, None}
	ctrl_unit{string} {ctrl_unit}  := unit1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{string} {unit1} 
	ctrl_label{int} {ctrl_label}  := get_ui_id(label1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {label1} ){Builtin, None}
	ctrl_label_text{string} {ctrl_label_text}  := label_text1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{string} {label_text1} 
	call handle_control_change{UserDefined, Call}
end function

function xy_timestamp_check{thread-unsafe}
	time_remaining1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {time_remaining1}  := 1500000
	last_cb1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {last_cb1}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID} 
	while((time_remaining1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {time_remaining1}  > 0) and (NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  = last_cb1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {last_cb1} )) 
		time_remaining1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {time_remaining1}  := time_remaining1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {time_remaining1}  - 10000
		wait(10000){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  = last_cb1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {last_cb1} )
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(lbl_seq_row_num{int[]} {lbl_seq_row_num} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
			set_control_par(lbl_seq_row_num[xy_active_row{int} {xy_active_row} ]{int} {lbl_seq_row_num} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE} , font_11_down{int} {font_11_down} ){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	end if
end function

	_iter0{int} {_iter0}  := 0

			inc(_iter1{int} {_iter1} ){Builtin, None}

			inc(_iter1{int} {_iter1} ){Builtin, None}

	end while
	_iter0{int} {_iter0}  := 0
	while(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  <= 4) 
		_iter1{int} {_iter1}  := 0
		while(_iter1{int} {_iter1}  <= 31) 
			_arp2.velo_rhythm_buffer[(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  * 32) + _iter1{int} {_iter1} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_rhythm_buffer}  := _arp2.velo_default_rhythm[(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  * 32) + _iter1{int} {_iter1} ]{int} {_arp2.velo_default_rhythm} 
			inc(_iter1{int} {_iter1} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(_iter0{int} {_iter0} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_iter0{int} {_iter0}  := 0
	while(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  <= 4) 
		_iter1{int} {_iter1}  := 0
		while(_iter1{int} {_iter1}  <= 31) 
			_arp3.rhythm[(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  * 32) + _iter1{int} {_iter1} ]{int} {_arp3.rhythm}  := _arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  * 32) + _iter1{int} {_iter1} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm} 
			inc(_iter1{int} {_iter1} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(_iter0{int} {_iter0} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_iter0{int} {_iter0}  := 0
	while(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  <= 4) 
		_iter1{int} {_iter1}  := 0
		while(_iter1{int} {_iter1}  <= 31) 
			_arp3.velo_rhythm_buffer[(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  * 32) + _iter1{int} {_iter1} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_rhythm_buffer}  := _arp3.velo_default_rhythm[(_iter0{int} {_iter0}  * 32) + _iter1{int} {_iter1} ]{int} {_arp3.velo_default_rhythm} 
			inc(_iter1{int} {_iter1} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(_iter0{int} {_iter0} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + (arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 1)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.skip{int} {arp1.skip}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 2)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 3)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.note_selection{int} {arp1.note_selection}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 4)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 5)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.note_repeat{int} {arp1.note_repeat}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 6)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.octave{int} {arp1.octave}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 7)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	arp1.transpose{int} {arp1.transpose}  := _SEQ_PARAMETERS[(current_keyswitch{int} {current_keyswitch}  * 27) + ((arp1.idx{int} {arp1.idx}  * 9) + 8)]{int} {_SEQ_PARAMETERS} 
	if(arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  = 15)
		arp1.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp1.btn_seq_mode}  := 1
		arp1.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp1.btn_arp_mode}  := 0
	else
		arp1.btn_seq_mode{int} {arp1.btn_seq_mode}  := 0
		arp1.btn_arp_mode{int} {arp1.btn_arp_mode}  := 1
		arp1.last_non_custom_order{int} {arp1.last_non_custom_order}  := arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order} 
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(arp1.lbl_note_order{int} {arp1.lbl_note_order} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE} , arp1.note_order{int} {arp1.note_order}  - 2){Builtin, None}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(_rhythm_steps_list{int[]} {_rhythm_steps_list} ){Builtin, None} - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	if((s{int} {s}  > 2) and (arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  > 4))
		arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  := arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  - 3
		i{int} {i}  := 5
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None}
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
	else
		if(s{int} {s}  < 3)
			i{int} {i}  := 5
			while(i{int} {i}  <= 7) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
				inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
			end while
		end if
	end if
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 4) 
		if(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate}  > 4)
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list_triplets[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list_triplets} 
		else
			n{int} {n}  := _rhythm_steps_list[(s{int} {s}  * 5) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_rhythm_steps_list} 
		end if
		if(n{int} {n}  # -1)
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} ){Builtin, None}, i{int} {i} , n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	s{int} {s}  := mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} 
	arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  := max_eight_notes_list[s{int} {s} ]{int} {max_eight_notes_list} 
	select(arp1.rate{int} {arp1.rate} )
	case 0
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 8
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 60
	case 1
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 4
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 120
	case 2
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  * 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 240
	case 3
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 480
	case 4
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 960
	case 5
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := ((arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} ) * 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 160
	case 6
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := (arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} 
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 320
	case 7
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := ((arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes}  / 2) + arp1.max_eighth_notes{int} {arp1.max_eighth_notes} ) / 2
		arp1.mf_length{int} {arp1.mf_length}  := 640
	end select
	if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(arp1.mnu_reset{int} {arp1.mnu_reset} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 2)
		arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  := arp1.bar_limit{int} {arp1.bar_limit}  * 2
	end if
	if(see_arp_subpage{int} {see_arp_subpage}  = 7)
		arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps}  := arp1.rhythm_steps{int} {arp1.rhythm_steps} 
		if(arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps}  < signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} )
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , signature_min_table_bars[get_control_par(get_ui_id(mnu_signature{int} {mnu_signature} ){Builtin, None}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None}]{int} {signature_min_table_bars} ){Builtin, None}
		else
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_arp_dummy{int[]} {tbl_arp_dummy} , arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps} ){Builtin, None}
			set_table_steps_shown(tbl_rhythm_indicator{int[]} {tbl_rhythm_indicator} , arp1.steps{int} {arp1.steps} ){Builtin, None}
		end if
	end if
	bit_count00{int} {bit_count00}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
	hold00{int} {hold00}  := bit_count00{int} {bit_count00} 
	call visibility.show_custom_seq{UserDefined, Call}
	call visibility.arp_seq_mode{UserDefined, Call}
	call ui.update_rhythm{UserDefined, Call}

function double_click
	click_interval{int} {click_interval}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - new_click_time{int} {new_click_time} 
	new_click_time{int} {new_click_time}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
	if(click_interval{int} {click_interval}  < 220)
		see_page{int} {see_page}  := 4
		n40{int} {n40}  := hold_value00{int} {hold_value00} 
		v00{int} {v00}  := hold00{int} {hold00} 
		hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := idx190{int} {idx190} 
		idx190{int} {idx190}  := hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} 
		call update_visibility{UserDefined, Call}
	end if
end function

function update_solo
	idx190{int} {idx190}  := 0
	n40{int} {n40}  := 0
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= 4) 
		if(get_control_par(mixer.solo_button_ids[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {mixer.solo_button_ids} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)
			n40{int} {n40}  := 1
		end if
		inc(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
	hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  := 0
	while(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000}  <= 4) 
		if(n40{int} {n40}  = 1)
			if(get_control_par(mixer.solo_button_ids[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {mixer.solo_button_ids} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int} {ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN} , 397100, -1, 4, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int} {ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN} , 0, -1, 4, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
			end if
		else
			if(get_control_par(mixer.mute_button_ids[hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ]{int} {mixer.mute_button_ids} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None} = 1)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int} {ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN} , 0, -1, 4, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
			else
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int} {ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN} , 397100, -1, 4, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
			end if
		end if
		inc(hold_value000{int} {hold_value000} ){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 31) 
		n{int} {n}  := 0
		while(n{int} {n}  <= 8) 
			set_control_par_str(_lbl_seq_matrix[(i{int} {i}  * 9) + n{int} {n} ]{int} {_lbl_seq_matrix} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE} , lib_prefix{string} {lib_prefix}  & "btn_seq"){Builtin, None}
			inc(n{int} {n} ){Builtin, None}
		end while
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None}
